programme.desc: While serving a community service order for speeding, Roz develops a reputation at a retirement home as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of dies. Disturbed by the events, she turns to Frasier for advice. Guest starring James Earl Jones

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Ariana Bravo and Billy Monger present action from the fifth round of the season, held at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve in Montreal

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Gemma Longworth head to Co Antrim, where they find a farm stuffed with antique tractors and an old tin smith's studio that's a treasure trove of antique furniture

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: A couple from Norwich find shoes in their bread oven, and a couple's dream of buying a hamlet in Normandy is in jeopardy when their house sale falls through

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Keith and Heidi from Nottinghamshire try to find their dream holiday home in Alicante, with enough space for their combined four children, six grandchildren and two dogs to visit

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Dublin-born fire captain David is putting on a special drill to impress the new station chief and show how his elite team train to keep the residents of Tequesta safe. In the city of Palm Coast, Judy gets ready to enjoy her well-deserved retirement playing pickleball

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB go underground to tackle a major electrical fault at Château de Bourneau, while at Château Domaine de la Barde, Tim wants to build a vast new terrace, which means rebuilding a centuries-old wall and clearing a bamboo forest. in the Dordogne, Jon and Carmen's 300-year-old kitchen floor needs lifting and is only coming up in pieces

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon Garner and her husband Steve help Bob and Michelle from Southend-on-Sea, Essex, find their perfect retirement property in the Spanish sunshine. Meanwhile, in Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown are on the lookout for a coastal property with enough outdoor space to park bikes, motorbikes and a camper van for Irish clients Michelle and Steve

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at a favourite visit. They are in Rushden, Northamptonshire, where Susan and John Antoniou-Bailey are torn over their unique five-bedroom home. Susan loves its history and original features, but John has had enough of constantly moving between the disjointed, boxy rooms

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: A family of three dogs are split up to increase their chances of finding permanent homes, but nervous Annie sticks close to her more confident sister Ruby. Vocal cockapoo Darcy may find her hero in 11-year-old Luke, and Teddy the chow chow meets Woodgreen's Miss Lady Chow

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part two of two. At trial, Mundill was characterised as manipulative and ruthless. Mundill, Ravi and Ravi's accomplice Darren Peters were all charged with murder but ended up with different convictions and wildly different sentences. Drawing on police interviews, text messages, court documents and original interviews, this factual drama presents a complex picture of crime and punishment

programme.title: Murder of the Essex Boys: Blood and Betrayal
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story behind the 1995 Essex Range Rover murders. With two convictions and countless conspiracies later, questions remain unanswered concerning the deaths of Pat Tate, Tony Tucker and Craig Rolfe. Through exclusive interviews with key players in the Essex crime scene, detectives explore an all-new perspective

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 38-year-old paratrooper arrives at the Royal London after a paragliding accident. He has lost sensation in his legs and needs specialist high-risk surgery to fix his compacted spine and pelvis if he's to have a chance of walking again. Other patients include a pedestrian whose leg has been crushed by a bus in south London and a teenager who put his leg through a glass security door

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Documentary following Gypsy Rose Blanchard as she navigates her return to society after spending eight years in prison for the murder of her abusive mother. Gypsy-Rose looks back on her first year of freedom through never-before-seen footage, exposing the truth behind her tumultuous first 12 months as a once-again-free woman

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy-Rose is committed to her relationship with ex-fiancé Ken following her emotional, messy separation from husband Ryan. And to make things more complicated, she's now unexpectedly expecting - just six months after her release from prison. Due to her parole restrictions, a pregnant Gypsy has to juggle living in two households

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Drama written by Jack Thorne, and starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Sister Anna has been living a peaceful life as a nun in a convent for more than two decades. But a chance encounter with intriguing priest Father David leaves her with an uneasy feeling and threatens to disrupt the order that has governed her whole life so far.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: After her bold declaration, Anna attempts to adjust to the new path she has chosen but comes face to face with those from her past who disapprove. Meanwhile, as gossip spreads throughout the community, David tries to ignore the noise. But he clashes with the bishop and demons from his past threaten to rear their heads. Drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the final performance at London's Hackney Empire. Sam Ryder and Paloma Faith must choose one of the five acts as the performance of the night. Chantel's a kidney transplant survivor, Findlay sings his mother's favourite song, teenager Milo stopped singing for two years after being teased, and for Iranian refugee Mina, singing was once an act of rebellion. Finally there's Elliot: a wildcard entry with the best smile in Britain

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Amber Gill in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith go on holiday, while Woody begins dating an elderly woman who finds him irresistible, but only as long as he dresses as celebrated author Mark Twain. American comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca makes a pass at her boss in a moment of weakness and has to rely on Sam to help her out of an embarrassing predicament. American bar-room comedy, starring Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam is delighted when Rebecca invites him back to her place and thinks all his Christmases have come at once. Meanwhile, Norm and a group of professional Santas look forward to the end of the festive season. American bar-room comedy starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally decides to propose to Amy and persuades Ray to accompany him to meet her parents - who prove far from amenable to the idea. Comedy, starring Monica Horn, Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra urges Ray to be firmer with the twins, but his heavy-handed approach to discipline soon has her backtracking. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick visits Seattle and asks Frasier to take part in the radio station softball game, leaving him with only two days to learn to play the sport. Meanwhile, Niles becomes jealous of his nephew, who has developed a crush on Daphne

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz auditions for a position as the host of a radio show. After Frasier mentions to his agent Bebe that he would be sad to see his producer go, she tells the station manager that the psychiatrist will quit if Roz is hired. Comedy, guest starring Harriet Sansom Harris

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To mark KACL's 50th anniversary, Frasier decides to recreate the station's first mystery theatre broadcast, but his over-directing of the actors turns the live show into a complete disaster - just as Niles predicted. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Three Dates and a Break-Up - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Martin and Sherry consider ending their relationship, while Frasier scores a notable success on the romantic front, dating three women in one weekend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Marsha Mason

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to Dumfries to meet dairy farmer Jennifer, who has a former milking parlour overflowing with unwanted stuff

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The owners of a hamlet in France welcome guests to a 50th birthday party and a couple from Eastbourne discover the water has been cut off at their village in Portugal. In France, one of the owners has to spend Christmas alone

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Amber Gill joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Joanne hosts a singles night at the Best of British pub near Orlando. Andreas wants to expand his bootcamp brand and Holly ventures into historical costumes to grow her business

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion have just weeks left to complete a three-year wedding garden makeover before the first bridal party arrive. Tim and Krys get stuck with eight tons of quick-drying concrete. Tim and Sasha upgrade their chicken coop

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Lisa and Paul from East Yorkshire search for a family villa in Alicante, with sisters Charlotte and Sophie Rodriguez on hand to guide them through the local property market. On the Costa Blanca, Jo and Andrew Alderton help find a permanent Spanish home for former police officer Kevin and his wife Debbie

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Ellie Taylor and Liam Charles welcome a fresh batch of professional pastry chefs to compete for the title. Judges Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin set the tasks, beginning with the secret challenge, which sees the teams working without a recipe to create French classic choux pastry ring the Paris-Brest - but with a twist. Then they serve up showpieces inspired by childhood toys, each concealing crumble and custard-themed desserts elevated to new heights

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna's confidence is knocked when she is urged to reconsider her decision. David is still firmly in denial and starts to withdraw from the people closest to him. But when the church choir beach trip throws them into close proximity, Anna and David are forced to face some uncomfortable truths and secrets spill out. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-two-year old Mary is rushed in to Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham having been trapped under her car. Second World War veteran Norman, who's 95, is in resus with a dangerously low heart rate, and four-year-old George has come to the children's emergency department with his dad after getting a stone mysteriously stuck up his nose while playing football

programme.title: Untold
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the gangs recruiting young British women as drug mules to smuggle huge quantities of cannabis from party destination Thailand back to the UK

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox, David Wilson and Dr Graham Hill investigate the murder of Janine Downes, a 22-year-old mother of three and sex worker from Wolverhampton. On a freezing cold February evening in 1991, Janine was working in the red-light district and was seen climbing into a distinctive blue car. Hours later her naked and beaten corpse was discovered in a Shropshire layby. David and Emilia interview key witnesses and look for clues in Wolverhampton's red-light district - was Janine the victim of a potential serial killer?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect catches up with designer Max McMurdo, who converted a shipping container into a garden office. This time, Max has gone back to his old school in Bedford to create a classroom out of two more of the containers. George also visits a prototype for a mini home so small it can be driven on the back of a truck, and in Somerset, he meets a couple who have turned a vintage vehicle into a mobile cinema business

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Documentary following Gypsy Rose Blanchard as she navigates her return to society after spending eight years in prison for the murder of her abusive mother. Gypsy-Rose looks back on her first year of freedom through never-before-seen footage, exposing the truth behind her tumultuous first 12 months as a once-again-free woman

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Ariana Bravo and Billy Monger present action from the fifth round of the season, held at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve in Montreal

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sushi Ko, a Japanese restaurant in California that is losing up to $20,000 a month. Gordon finds owner and chef Akira lacking in confidence and self-esteem as the strain of an empty business is beginning to take its toll on his relationship with this family

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Krusty reveals the story of his past in a movie, while Bart and Lisa work as his personal assistants on the film and learn about the early years of their parents' relationship

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa applies for a prestigious position in the school band, but loses out to new classmate Allison - who starts outstripping her in the popularity stakes. Upset at being relegated to second place, she resorts to sabotage in a bid to beat her rival. With the guest voice of Winona Ryder

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sees The Bridges of Madison County and begins pining for a little romance to spice up her life, so the family reminisces about impassioned encounters in days gone by. Featuring the guest voices of Michelle Pfeiffer and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Dave and Lynn are making progress on their farmhouse renovations and Susie and Bill start making plans for their garden

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with Lucy Porter joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm foolishly believes he has discovered a soft centre beneath Rebecca's steely exterior. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff puts up a fight to save his family home from developers, who plan to build a convenience store in its place. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam is put forward as the star prize at a benefit auction held at the bar and soon finds himself in Lilith's hands, who has every intention of getting her money's worth. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray lies to Debra, pretending he has bought her something extra special for Christmas - then has to seek Robert's advice to choose a gift that lives up to his extravagant claims. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: Lisa and Paul from East Yorkshire search for a family villa in Alicante, with sisters Charlotte and Sophie Rodriguez on hand to guide them through the local property market. On the Costa Blanca, Jo and Andrew Alderton help find a permanent Spanish home for former police officer Kevin and his wife Debbie

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Ellie Taylor and Liam Charles welcome a fresh batch of professional pastry chefs to compete for the title. Judges Cherish Finden and Benoit Blin set the tasks, beginning with the secret challenge, which sees the teams working without a recipe to create French classic choux pastry ring the Paris-Brest - but with a twist. Then they serve up showpieces inspired by childhood toys, each concealing crumble and custard-themed desserts elevated to new heights

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna's confidence is knocked when she is urged to reconsider her decision. David is still firmly in denial and starts to withdraw from the people closest to him. But when the church choir beach trip throws them into close proximity, Anna and David are forced to face some uncomfortable truths and secrets spill out. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ninety-two-year old Mary is rushed in to Queen's Medical Centre in Nottingham having been trapped under her car. Second World War veteran Norman, who's 95, is in resus with a dangerously low heart rate, and four-year-old George has come to the children's emergency department with his dad after getting a stone mysteriously stuck up his nose while playing football

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 38-year-old paratrooper arrives at the Royal London after a paragliding accident. He has lost sensation in his legs and needs specialist high-risk surgery to fix his compacted spine and pelvis if he's to have a chance of walking again. Other patients include a pedestrian whose leg has been crushed by a bus in south London and a teenager who put his leg through a glass security door

programme.title: Vengeance: Murder on the Heath
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part fact-based crime drama. Best friends Gagandip and Ravi fell in love with student doctor Mundill, a love triangle that destroyed their friendship and ultimately ended in what the headlines called the honeytrap murder. Gagandip attempted to sexually assault Mundill, who conspired with Ravi on a revenge plot that went horribly wrong. Starring Dee Ahluwalia, Ikky Kabir and Sasha Desouza-Willock

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Paul's poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, it's time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarah's evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect catches up with designer Max McMurdo, who converted a shipping container into a garden office. This time, Max has gone back to his old school in Bedford to create a classroom out of two more of the containers. George also visits a prototype for a mini home so small it can be driven on the back of a truck, and in Somerset, he meets a couple who have turned a vintage vehicle into a mobile cinema business

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill convert a small barn in Devon to try and make the best use of the space. Dannie and Grace prepare to welcome Barry the boar

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: Tony and Scott investigate prolonged delays on a freeway upgrade, while Nat and Ash struggle to engage with a newly appointed assisting minister. Beverly manages the farewell for an NBA staffer, and the office fridge wreaks technical havoc. Return of the Australian comedy, starring Rob Sitch

programme.title: Mr Bean

Alesha Dixon risks social catastrophe by handing over her phone in Celebrity Send-to-All, and Father Christmas himself receives the surprise of his life in Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's Big Break

programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachel's intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The buffoon wreaks havoc when he goes shopping and dines at an exclusive restaurant - and there is an unfortunate incident when he meets a member of the royal family at a film premiere. Rowan Atkinson stars

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hero bumbles his way through a disaster-packed day that takes him from the swimming baths and lunch in the park on to a night at the cinema with his girlfriend. Rowan Atkinson stars, with Angus Deayton and Matilda Ziegler

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A routine trip to the dentist ends disastrously for Bean, and a quiet stroll in the park gradually turns into a pitched battle with a wasp. Rowan Atkinson stars, with appearances by Richard Wilson and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hapless hero plans the Christmas holiday of a lifetime - but fate intervenes and pulls the rug out from under his feet, reducing what should have been the perfect festive season to a frantic comedy of errors. Slapstick, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Mr Bean

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

Chris Kamara will have an embarrassing text message sent in his name in Send to All, soprano Katherine Jenkins provides the music, and a York mum gets a surprise to discover that Michael's been in her house, and he knows all about her. Joey and Phoebe have a cross-country adventure. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to move in together, but have difficulty explaining to Rachel that she will not be a part of the arrangement. Meanwhile, Phoebe begs Ross to get his latest marriage annulled. American comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.desc: The guys play the 'Laugh Man Standing' challenge in a waiting room, and team up as customers at a chicken restaurant. The punishment involves a Broadway concert

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q survey park-goers at Universal Studios Hollywood, then pose as maintenance workers while answering questions over a walkie-talkie with crazy one-liners

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones' cable TV goes on the blink, leaving them with a large amount of time on their hands - which they fill by playing games. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra's accusation that Ray is pessimistic stirs him into adopting a more positive outlook, but the rest of the family is not impressed by his change in attitude. Figure skater Katarina Witt guests stars in the comedy, with Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert both want to keep a stray bulldog that Ray brings home. It reminds Ray of a dog he had to give up as a child, but it turns out that the cute canine is not so stray after all. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The neighbours are upset by the antics of Ray's parents and gather at his house to thrash out a solution, but their meeting is gatecrashed by the troublesome pair

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A psychotherapist arrives to interview Debra for a book on the American family, but finds the rest of the household far more captivating, leaving the humble housewife feeling left out

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones reminisce about more peaceful times in their first apartment and recall why they ended up living across the road from Ray's meddlesome parents

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One's Ready
programme.desc: Ross is due to make an important speech at the museum, and invites the gang along for moral support - but bickering and personal problems soon threaten to make him late. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is alarmed to learn she has attracted the unwanted attentions of a stalker, and Monica comes up with a plan to deal with her broodiness. American comedy, guest starring David Arquette, with Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler ponders the importance of commitment, Monica starts work in a restaurant and Phoebe's home truths make her an unpopular choice as Joey's agent. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Actress Isabella Rossellini makes Ross's day by dropping into Central Perk for a coffee. Phoebe's efforts to introduce her half-brother to the city give him the wrong idea about her line of work. Comedy, with David Schwimmer, Lisa Kudrow and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Janice persuades the pals to reveal their deepest, darkest secrets about a period in their relationships three years earlier. Phoebe is trying to move out without telling Monica, Rachel wants one last fling before she gets married and Ross makes a distressing discovery. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Maggie Wheeler

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Monica buys a bed from Janice's husband but the wrong one is delivered. Joey gets a job teaching a soap opera acting class, while Rachel tries to ease the tension between Ross and her father

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: Phoebe convinces herself she is a walking jinx who keeps causing people to die mysteriously. Monica hides the fact that Ben has been injured, while Chandler and Janice make a tough decision about their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang holds an American football match on Thanksgiving. Opposing team captains Ross and Monica relive their sibling rivalry on the pitch, while Joey tries to outflank Chandler

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel hands in her notice at Central Perk, while Ross accidentally breaks a girl's leg and ends up having to go door to door peddling cookies. Joey starts a new job selling Christmas trees, but Phoebe thinks it is a cruel trade and sets about saving the merchandise

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Rachel's attractive and influential new friend sends Ross into a jealous frenzy, while Chandler gets drunk and falls for the curvaceous charms of one of Joey's many sisters - but later cannot remember which one

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross becomes increasingly jealous of Rachel's new workmate, and Joey auditions for a Broadway musical - even though he cannot dance. Meanwhile, Monica falls for a would-be poet

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends
programme.desc: Monica bumps into ex-boyfriend Richard in a video store and the pair agree it would be a mistake to start dating again - but soon fall back into bed. Meanwhile, Phoebe begins seeing an athlete. Tom Selleck guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's former singing partner turns up with the idea of using Smelly Cat in a commercial. Chandler dates a woman with a prosthetic leg, and Ross's jealousy gets the better of him. Sherilyn Fenn guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: A harassed Rachel tells Ross she thinks they should take a break from each other - so he responds by getting drunk and sleeping with a woman Joey and Chandler have been chasing. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monica's bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything

programme.title: The Waterboy (1998)
programme.desc: An American football team's waterboy puts up with constant ridicule from the players. But one day his anger gets the better of him and he demonstrates an unexpected talent for tackling - so the coach gives him a chance to prove his worth on the pitch. However, he has to keep his blossoming sporting career a secret from his overprotective mother. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Kathy Bates, Henry Winkler and Fairuza Balk

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Walsh Senior and Junior embark on another challenge-filled road trip and this time they are in for a real culture shock as they head to Latin America. They start out in Mexico, where they grapple with one of the country's most famous sports - lucha libre wrestling. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes are still in Mexico and still on the side of a mountain. Can they complete the final part of the challenge, which requires Bradley to swing across the top of the mountain with nothing but a terrifying drop below him? Once recovered, the father and son head toward Mexico's coast, where Barney takes his dad inside a pitch-black cave that's home to snakes and thousands of bats. They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sets out to halt the plans of an unscrupulous businessman intending to defraud Springfield's residents by supplying them with a defective monorail system. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Hunted, Bake Off: The Professionals, Made in Chelsea, Love in the Jungle, Top of the Pops 1992, Dickinson's Real Deal, Britain's Got Talent, and BBC News coverage of the Prime Minister's apparent involvement in Partygate

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Coronation Street, Antiques Roadshow, Frozen Planet II, Kings of Pain, Help! My House Is Haunted, Only Connect, and ITV News coverage of the mini-budget

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Business development manager Emily is looking for a tall, dark, handsome man with good manners, but when part-time model Matt starts talking about alien abduction their conversation is at risk of drying up. Martial arts instructor Ian meets Liverpudlian Lindsay, who's ready to date again after a difficult few years, and he certainly seems to live up to her expectations, while receptionist Natasha, who has been out of the dating game for a couple of years, sits down with chef Oskar, whose laidback manner quickly puts her at ease

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch works on Andy to cover a massive mistake that has had him banned from barbecues, while Pash and Uzzi team up to help Joe alter his giant sleazy slogan tattoo

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr oversees the disputes and deliberations on the festive topics that have set the British public's chins wagging in the run-up to Christmas. Comedians Jon Richardson and Sean Lock head the teams, joined by Holly Willoughby, Henning Wehn, Alan Davies and Roisin Conaty. Nick Helm and Joe Wilkinson also make guest appearances. First shown in 2013

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. However, little do they realise that Eric is going to try to fool them by appearing as a waiter. Featuring Kat Cole, Paul Damico, Andy Wiederhorn, Sheldon Yellen, Anthony Wedo and Jane Grote Abell

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs?When self-proclaimed superfans Missy and Jay ask for the twins' help, the bros can't help but try to pull off a prank. But the fun and games are over as Jonathan updates the interiors and Drew deals with a constantly increasing budget.Short:The twins pull a prank on self-proclaimed superfans Missy and Jay. But the fun and games are over as Jonathan updates the interiors and Drew deals with a constantly increasing budget

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, married couple Leanne and Senol start things off with a feast of Turkish food, which hits the spot for fun-loving Paul and his partner Verity, though Paul's love of Hawaiian shirts doesn't go down well with Catrin and Josh, who don't like the hosts' meaty main course either. On day two Catrin and Josh attempt some Welsh fine dining, but the complicated dessert fails to live up to its billing. Finally, Paul and Verity get a turn to impress with their version of good pub grub

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Berkshire, beauty therapist Emma and her boyfriend Sean kick off the week with an night of acronyms, pet names and fine food. On day two, the experienced partnership of Jasbir and Sarb attempt to wow their guests with a night of authentic Indian food and Bollywood dancing. Finally, Mel and Tony host with a menu filled with traditional British classics in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A nurse from Derby aims to give his law student fiancee the wedding of her dreams, planning to base the big day on Jane Austen's Pride and Prejudice, the bride-to-be's favourite novel, despite her hopes for a modern ceremony. However, the fact he knows barely anything about the famous love story threatens his chances of success

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 24-year-old fisherman from Manorbier on the Pembrokeshire coast hopes to give his hairdresser fiancee her perfect wedding. However, the bride's phobia of boats and aversion to the sea could spell trouble for the groom, who dreams of having a nautical ceremony

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jose Costa, the president of North Carolina-based automotive-care franchise Maaco, goes undercover to join his employees on the frontline, disguised as a food truck owner competing in a reality show. He wants to meet the staff who keep the firm on the road to success and find out whether his franchisees are following guidelines

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Rivera, the president of Phenix Salon Suites in Colorado Springs - a company that rents boutiques to hairdressers, nail technicians and beauty therapists - goes incognito to see first-hand what she needs to improve on and what makes her franchisees successful

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Nicole and firefighter Matt's compact 1950s home may have been built in the rock n roll era, but it's neither rocking nor rolling. In fact, it needs a serious refurb. Who better to get involved than Jonathan, Drew and Matt's firefighting buddies? The brothers start at full steam ahead as they try to heat up the property's appearance

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In north London, Helen and her Albanian boyfriend David kick off the contest with their Greek menu. Their food goes down well with Sara and her Aussie husband Thierry, which is more than can be said for David's views on women's roles within the home. On day two, Vicky and Geoff cook up an Italian menu, but their rock and pop idol dress code is a huge flop with one couple. The hosts face a grilling over food shortcuts, and Helen and Vicky go head to head in the battle of the cheesecakes. Finally, Sara and Thierry serve up the fashions and food of the 1980s. However, one guest makes a fashion faux pas about Sara's favourite frock

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. John Robins demonstrates the power of his forearms, Steve Pemberton stains his shirt with orange juice, and Sophie Willan repeatedly shouts the name of a body part in Little Alex Horne's little flustered face. Taskmaster Greg Davies has his usual task of trying to award points for things such as Nick Mohammed constructing a bottle orchestra and Joanne McNally trying to act out the word 'beer'

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Bill Bailey taking on guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Isy Suttie. Susie Dent is joined by Joe Lycett in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: First episode of the comedy following two brothers who visit their parents once a week for dinner, but have to put up with their family's many eccentricities. Jonny Goodman's father asks him to stash some magazines at his flat following a clear-out of the house, and a sofa bed gets stuck on the stairs, splitting the relatives between the ground and first floors. Guest starring Mark Heap, with Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The siblings are intrigued by their father's behaviour when they find him peering into his underpants with a magnifying glass. Their mother just wants to have a pleasant meal, but it is constantly interrupted by neighbour Jim, who is terrified of his own dog, and Adam receives a lecture about girls from his dad. Comedy, starring Paul Ritter and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell as misfits who have an unhealthy dependence on each other. Mark sets himself the task of sleeping with his next door neighbour Toni, basing his seduction technique on the Battle of Stalingrad and plotting to humiliate his flatmate Jeremy in the process

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark tries to flirt with Sophie but worries she may think he is a Nazi, while Jeremy realises his music career is going nowhere fast and reluctantly applies for an office job. Comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Alice gives Hugo a Spice Girls inspired tattoo, Pash alters Shelly's preposterous poem inking, and Uzzi works on cover-up for Craig and his horrible horse tattoo

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. John Robins demonstrates the power of his forearms, Steve Pemberton stains his shirt with orange juice, and Sophie Willan repeatedly shouts the name of a body part in Little Alex Horne's little flustered face. Taskmaster Greg Davies has his usual task of trying to award points for things such as Nick Mohammed constructing a bottle orchestra and Joanne McNally trying to act out the word 'beer'

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Bill Bailey taking on guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Isy Suttie. Susie Dent is joined by Joe Lycett in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? With a baby on the way and two dogs, Catherine and Nick are ready for a big move. But six months on the market with no luck and no feedback have left them feeling lost. Can the brothers turn their unsellable property into a place to scream and shout about?Short:Expectant parents Catherine and Nick are ready for a big move but are having no luck. Can the brothers turn their unsellable property into a place to scream and shout about?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stoke-on-Trent couples Rob and Rich, Eddie 'The Beast' Hall and wife Alex, and Simon and spouse Lauren try to win £1,000 by throwing the perfect dinner party. Rob and Rich are first, going all-out to impress with fine dining cuisine

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bike restorer Ian and his Lithuanian-born fiancee Loretta kick off the competition in Stockport with dishes inspired by their Indian and Lithuanian heritage. Day two sees Gemma and Emily, aka 'Gemily', attempt to woo their guests with their Moroccan-themed menu. Finally, it's Tim and Luan's chance to show the other couples how it should be done as they offer up a taste of their favourite dishes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old man hopes to give his fiancee of four months her perfect wedding. However, while bride Alex dreams of being surrounded by friends and family at a traditional ceremony, groom Luke wants to get married on the party island of Ibiza, where the couple first met

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 22-year-old care worker hopes to give his 25-year-old hairstylist fiancee the wedding of her dreams. However, the groom has a reputation for partying on a regular basis and being unreliable with money, and the bride's regular change of image makes it difficult for him to determine what type of ceremony would be to her liking

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of a New Jersey-based company providing chauffeured luxury transportation goes to work among his own staff by posing as a contestant in a reality show. David Seelinger believes that the quality of customer care helps maintain a company's reputation, and wants to make sure his firm is on the right track for the future

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Robert Powells, co-founder and president of Rocket Fizz Soda Pop and Candy Shops, the largest fizzy drink and sweet shop franchise in America, dons a disguise to go undercover in his own company. The California-based firm has experienced rapid growth and with that comes the responsibility to make sure it stays on track as it gets bigger, so Robert is keen to find out more about the challenges the organisation faces

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, Andy got a new job, leaving little time for DIY-ing. So it looks like a state andnow it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a family-friendly country home with space for a hockey rink. And is it that much of a surprise when Dana and Andy fall for yet another fixer-upper?Short:After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, it was left in a state. Now it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a home with space for a hockey rink

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in north London compete to host the best dinner party. First to host are husband and wife Elorm and Mimi, who are confident their Afro-fusion menu and some Afro-beats will see them triumph. Night two sees Kiri and Dale host a soiree that includes an introduction to the host's love of taxidermy. On the final night, hosts Serge and Eleni treat their guests to a menu originating from their Greek-Cypriot heritage. Their twist is a somewhat unique 'Kebab Olympics' in the back garden

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. Greg Davies has been presented with a great many bizarre moments during his glorious reign as the Taskmaster, but this episode ups the ante in the strangeness stakes. Why has John Robins attached oars to his arms? Why does Nick Mohammed keep winking at Alex Horne? Why is Sophie Willan making a wolf beatbox? Why is Steve Pemberton skinning a mannequin? And why has Joanne McNally wilfully desecrated Greg's noble statue?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Mum falls out with grandma over some new curtains, leaving it up to Adam to help settle their differences. Meanwhile, Adam's father drops the evening meal on the kitchen floor and scoops it back into the dish, hoping to keep his blunder a secret. Comedy, starring Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The siblings' father lands himself in trouble when his wife discovers he kept his stash of science magazines after the clear-out, so he pretends to burn them in the garden. Mum's best friend comes round to try on a new dress, and Jim is distraught after his dog disappears. Comedy, guest starring Tracy-Ann Oberman, with Simon Bird and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: The duo decide a night on the town is in order and find themselves getting acquainted with a teenage goth at Lazerbowl. Jeremy perseveres with Toni, despite her love for Peter Gabriel, and Mark discovers a melon has more merits than a bowling ball

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark makes a new friend at a business conference and Jeremy reluctantly considers accepting Super Hans as a replacement flatmate - but soon decides against it. Offbeat comedy, starring Robert Webb, Olivia Coleman and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: Sketch, Alice and Jay take their tattoo cover-up operation abroad in an attempt to stop more holiday-makers returning home with disastrous ink-jobs. Ian needs help from Sketch to cover his Magaluf monstrosity, Alice helps Aston with his ugly Ibiza sunset, and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember on his final holiday before he joins the army. Alice, Jay, Sketch and Paisley also make the most of their time off in the sun by hitting the water park and going paragliding

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. Greg Davies has been presented with a great many bizarre moments during his glorious reign as the Taskmaster, but this episode ups the ante in the strangeness stakes. Why has John Robins attached oars to his arms? Why does Nick Mohammed keep winking at Alex Horne? Why is Sophie Willan making a wolf beatbox? Why is Steve Pemberton skinning a mannequin? programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with Sean Lock and Henning Wehn taking on guest captain Bill Bailey and Jessica Hynes. Susie Dent is joined by Tom Allen in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and painter Josh sits down for a meal with student and part-time waitress Sophia, while Old Etonian Leslie and blogger Babs bond over a shared respect of Michelle Obama. Property developer Amanda is ready to begin dating again after her husband passed away, but she and sales executive Brad both have the distinct feeling they may have met before, while Sue returns to the restaurant after nerves got the better of her during her first visit

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed O'Neill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny is not happy when Gloria hires a male nanny and it turns out Jay isn't that keen either. Phil is worried about his dad Frank, and embarks on a mission to help him get his groove back, while Pepper pops by to plan Mitch and Cam's wedding, but when talk turns to unicorns, the pair attempt to rein their pal in. Nathan Lane guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A family trip to the school fair proves eventful for Phil and Claire, while Haley's relaxing day by the pool is interrupted by an awkward encounter with 'manny' Andy and Jay is unimpressed when Gloria signs him up for 'cop duties'

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is appointed Springfield's new sanitation commissioner, but finds it so hard to keep his elaborate election promises that he is forced to spend the year's budget allocation in his first month in charge. Featuring the guest voices of U2 and Steve Martin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two company executives hire Homer to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain, the ominously named Murderhorn, as a promotional stunt for their energy bar product. With the guest voice of Brendan Fraser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is put in charge of Captain Holt's security after he receives several death threats - a responsibility he not only enjoys, but also abuses as much as he can. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to make a deal with a suspect Diaz has just arrested in an attempt to catch a car thief he has been tracking for years. Boyle's colleagues set out to meet his every need when he returns to work after being shot in the line of duty, and Captain Holt struggles to find a home for two puppies

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. Mitch meets Lily's know-it-all friend and male nanny Andy (Andy DeVine) makes a welcome return

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys move into a hotel while their house is being treated for mould, but when they are forced to share a single room, cabin fever soon sets in. Gloria worries after finding out that Manny is dating one of the popular girls at school, while Cam's attempt to keep his football team's unprecedented winning streak going is threatened by a 'cursed' Mitchell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are sent into a panic when a loud, obnoxious couple come to look at the house next door. Jay is furious to learn that Manny is dating the granddaughter of his biggest business rival, while Mitch and Cam take on Lily's tyrannical teacher, Mrs Plank. Steve Zahn and Andrea Anders join the cast as new neighbours Ronnie and Amber, with guest star Tyne Daly

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. programme.title: Hollyoaks
