programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize, beginning with beautician Rachael and her partner Nick, who prepare a selection of dishes they've never made before. Dionne and Ameel prepare an Indian-inspired meal on the second night of the competition, before Angela and Jeff hope their no-nonsense menu can secure them the money

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gin's flat

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sets out to halt the plans of an unscrupulous businessman intending to defraud Springfield's residents by supplying them with a defective monorail system. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Hunted, Bake Off: The Professionals, Made in Chelsea, Love in the Jungle, Top of the Pops 1992, Dickinson's Real Deal, Britain's Got Talent, and BBC News coverage of the Prime Minister's apparent involvement in Partygate

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and painter Josh sits down for a meal with student and part-time waitress Sophia, while Old Etonian Leslie and blogger Babs bond over a shared respect of Michelle Obama. Property developer Amanda is ready to begin dating again after her husband passed away, but she and sales executive Brad both have the distinct feeling they may have met before, while Sue returns to the restaurant after nerves got the better of her during her first visit

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed O'Neill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny is not happy when Gloria hires a male nanny and it turns out Jay isn't that keen either. Phil is worried about his dad Frank, and embarks on a mission to help him get his groove back, while Pepper pops by to plan Mitch and Cam's wedding, but when talk turns to unicorns, the pair attempt to rein their pal in. Nathan Lane guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A family trip to the school fair proves eventful for Phil and Claire, while Haley's relaxing day by the pool is interrupted by an awkward encounter with 'manny' Andy and Jay is unimpressed when Gloria signs him up for 'cop duties'

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a children's news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockman's book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is appointed Springfield's new sanitation commissioner, but finds it so hard to keep his elaborate election promises that he is forced to spend the year's budget allocation in his first month in charge. Featuring the guest voices of U2 and Steve Martin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two company executives hire Homer to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain, the ominously named Murderhorn, as a promotional stunt for their energy bar product. With the guest voice of Brendan Fraser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is put in charge of Captain Holt's security after he receives several death threats - a responsibility he not only enjoys, but also abuses as much as he can. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to make a deal with a suspect Diaz has just arrested in an attempt to catch a car thief he has been tracking for years. Boyle's colleagues set out to meet his every need when he returns to work after being shot in the line of duty, and Captain Holt struggles to find a home for two puppies

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Elsewhere, things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and win the £1,000 prize, beginning with beautician Rachael and her partner Nick, who prepare a selection of dishes they've never made before. Dionne and Ameel prepare an Indian-inspired meal on the second night of the competition, before Angela and Jeff hope their no-nonsense menu can secure them the money

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Café Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon in Panama and are immediately brought back to earth with a bump when they move in together and start facing the challenges of real life. Also, a heated argument could prove disastrous for one couple's budding wedded bliss

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Christmas has arrived, providing a typically chaotic time for the Pritchett-Dunphys, as Jay takes Manny to chop down a tree, Mitchell rushes to finish his shopping and Cam and Lily get into the holiday spirit at a charity event. Meanwhile, Gloria has a visit from her mum. Directed by Breaking Bad star Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to share his love of dancing with unenthusiastic son Luke and Claire struggles to hide her frustration while teaching an overly cautious Alex to drive. Mitch and Cam enter the cut-throat world of wedding venue booking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampa's metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Blood-curdling tales from America's favourite family in another Halloween special. The spooky stories feature an island inhabited by 'manimals', plus tales about an army of Homer clones and zombie cowboys

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is asked to help the Rolling Stones with a forthcoming benefit gig, filling his head with dreams of rock 'n' roll stardom. Unfortunately, they only want him to stand in as a roadie. Featuring the voices of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Lenny Kravitz, Tom Petty and Elvis Costello

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Bart v Lisa v the Third Grade
programme.desc: Lisa is thrilled to learn she has been moved up a grade at school - until she discovers Bart's poor performance has caused him to be demoted to the same class. Tensions inevitably develop between the pair, but a crisis during a field trip teaches them the value of working together. With the guest voice of Tony Bennett

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago's ongoing bet about who can make the most arrests comes to an embarrassing conclusion, while Boyle receives a medal following the shooting, but his pain medication loosens his tongue and he starts to reveal what he really thinks of his colleagues

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gin's flat

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil steps up to the plate to cook Thanksgiving dinner, employing Luke as his sous chef. However, Claire is not convinced the pair can pull it off, so buys a back-up bird. Jay and Gloria's plan to go away for the holiday is scuppered, so the pair decide to maintain a low profile. Meanwhile, Mitch forces Cam to play bad cop when Lily refuses to wear a nice dress. Nigella Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch reluctantly lets his distressed colleague Brenda stay the night, Phil and Claire think Alex has let her imagination run wild after she tells them she has a boyfriend, and Jay hits a Manny-shaped obstacle while trying to get out of accompanying Gloria to a party. Kirsten Johnston (3rd Rock from the Sun) guest stars, with Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Ty Burrell, Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sets out to halt the plans of an unscrupulous businessman intending to defraud Springfield's residents by supplying them with a defective monorail system. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: After an explosive meeting with an expert, one couple are left to pick up the pieces of their already fragile relationship, ut there is still a grain of hope for one loved-up pair

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Hunted, Bake Off: The Professionals, Made in Chelsea, Love in the Jungle, Top of the Pops 1992, Dickinson's Real Deal, Britain's Got Talent, and BBC News coverage of the Prime Minister's apparent involvement in Partygate

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: PK Humble lands himself in trouble with the agents, but his day gets a whole lot better when he goes on a date with Joan. Stephen meets Claira for a make-or-break chat

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Who Are You Going to Telephone?
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries beef stew made from tenderloin in Arizona and in Chicago he visits a bar with burgers named after rock bands

programme.desc: Guy Fieri's in Sicily, Italy, digging into primo prawns over squid ink pasta, A-list arancini and next-level ravioli

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers put their twist on the classic pavlova and take on a toffee technical, before creating showpiece that involves wrapping a delicate dessert in intricately patterned sponge. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present a Bake Off first as the amateurs take part in German week, in which the amateurs attempt to perfect traditional German biscuits in the signature, followed by a technical torte fit for a prince. Finally, they must rise to the challenge by creating a showstopping tiered cake using yeast. Who will be saying auf wiedersehen? Herr Hollywood and Frau Leith have the answer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host pastry week, which sees the amateur bakers make signature choux pastry doughnuts and tackle a tricky Turkish technical, before creating a savoury showstopper where they must pack a pastry pie with flavour as well as a delicate design. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results, before deciding who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present as the bakers put their twist on a classic caramel tart and produce a family favourite biscuit bar in the technical, before creating a showstopping dessert encased in a sugar dome. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts, deciding who will win star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining bakers explore alternative ingredients during free-from week. The signature requires them to bake without dairy, before a hearty vegan technical and finally towering showstopping celebration cakes that must be entirely free-from gluten. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted star baker title and who will be leaving the Bake Off tent?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present the semi-final in which the amateurs face a trio of patisserie challenges, including a delicate layered slice signature and a regional French classic in the technical. On day two, they must use all their skill and creativity as they serve up a showstopping entremets display. But who will be going through to the final three? Only Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith know the answer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: They came, they saw, they baked - and along the way nine of them were eliminated from the competition. Now only three amateur bakers remain to compete in the final. All they need to do to impress Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith is produce a carrot cake worthy of winning, come out tops in a technical based on a Belgian recipe and rustle up a showstopping banquet fit for the Mad Hatter's Tea Party. Everything is still to play for - and Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas are on hand to lighten the atmosphere if it all gets too tense

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam explores the football food culture of Glasgow and Celtic FC. First up is a Stornoway black pudding, then a unique haggis and whisky topped pizza

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: Lisa Reeves wasn't looking for love when she met Randy Gwathney, a charming Arkansas man in uniform. What she got, instead, was bloodshed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: When Erika Verdecia goes missing, her family launches their own search for her. What their homegrown investigation uncovers is a tragic trail of bloodshed.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Shana Grice was murdered after being stalked by her ex-boyfriend, Michael Lane. He denied involvement, but experts examined police videos to determine the truth

programme.title: I'd Kill for You
programme.desc: The story of successful real-estate broker Vern Holbrook, whose plan to sell his business faced a hitch when the prospective buyer was unable to make his payments. In May 2013, the 79-year-old was attacked in an arranged ambush. He lay in a coma for six weeks, and died eight months later

programme.title: American Detective with Lt Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Veteran investigator Robert Cushing revisits the abduction and murder of a young schoolteacher in a New England town. He is appalled by the depravity of the killer's plan

programme.title: American Detective with Lt Joe Kenda

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Oscar-winning drama, starring Robert De Niro, Christopher Walken, Meryl Streep, John Savage and John Cazale in his last film role

programme.title: In Harm's Way (1965)
programme.desc: Two Navy officers are disgraced in the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, one for a disastrous engagement with the enemy and the other for a drunken brawl after learning of his wife's death. They get another chance to prove their worth when they are placed in charge of a vital counter-offensive. Second World War drama, starring John Wayne, Kirk Douglas and Henry Fonda

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A time-travelling actor meets his first wife again and is forced to reassess his outlook on life

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: An Enterprise landing party including Kirk and Spock is drawn into a trap by two beings who have assumed human form as witch and warlock. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve meets a teenager with extra-sensory perception, and together they track down an enemy intent on stealing secret laser technology

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The maverick officer reluctantly teams up with a psychic to investigate the kidnapping of a nine-year-old girl. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Marcy Lafferty

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A senator asks Walker to stop a criminal who has infiltrated the federal law enforcement's computer systems. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: Starship Troopers (1997)
programme.desc: Courageous military recruits hurl themselves into a desperate war against alien insects set on destroying mankind. They blast off for the creatures' home planet in a last-ditch attempt to save the human race from annihilation - little realising the carnage that awaits them. Sci-fi adventure from director Paul Verhoeven, starring Casper Van Dien, Denise Richards and Dina Meyer

programme.title: The 13th Warrior (1999)
programme.desc: A disgraced Arabic nobleman exiled from his Baghdad home joins forces with Norse warriors at the close of the first millennium, and ends up battling seemingly invincible fiends during an epic journey. Action adventure adapted from the novel Eaters of the Dead by Michael Crichton, starring Antonio Banderas, Diane Venora, Dennis Storhi, Vladimir Kulich and Omar Sharif

programme.title: The Business (2005)
programme.desc: A criminal flees London in the 1980s to start a new life on the Costa del Sol. He is soon drawn into the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile, but his relationship with a psychotic crook's girlfriend threatens to bring his criminal career to an abrupt end. Crime drama, starring Danny Dyer, Tamer Hassan and Geoff Bell

programme.title: Freight (2010)
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Bite the Bullet (1975)
programme.desc: A newspaper organises a gruelling 700-mile horse race across the wilderness, with a substantial cash prize at stake. Two former cavalry soldiers must put their friendship to one side to compete for first place, but face stiff competition in a cunning prostitute, an English sportsman and a cocky would-be gunslinger. Western, starring Gene Hackman, Candice Bergen, James Coburn and Ian Bannen

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind (1965)
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for outlaws, find themselves pursued by a relentless posse. Western, written, starring and co-produced by Jack Nicholson, with Cameron Mitchell and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Mercenary opportunist Harry Mudd programs an android to take control of the Enterprise and take it to an uncharted planet. Once there, he tries to make Kirk and his crew an offer they cannot refuse. William Shatner and Roger C Carmel star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Part one. Steve's fiancee Jaime Sommers is critically injured in a skydiving accident and rebuilt by scientists, becoming the world's first bionic woman

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: As two rival street gangs prepare to settle their differences in all-out battle, Hooker sets out to catch the villain stirring up trouble between them - an illegal arms dealer. Vintage American police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The mastermind uses the knowledge gained from computer hacking to terrorize federal agents, while he manages to prevent Walker from finding him

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: A military policeman-turned-cop reluctantly teams up with his old commanding officer to investigate a murder at a San Francisco army base - and uncovers a deadly conspiracy in the process. Action thriller, starring Sean Connery, Mark Harmon and Meg Ryan

programme.title: The Eiger Sanction (1975)
programme.desc: An art professor who once worked as an assassin is blackmailed into returning to his old career to eliminate a spy. However, his target is in the middle of a mountaineering expedition, forcing the hitman to embark on a perilous climb up the Eiger in hot pursuit. Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With George Kennedy, Jack Cassidy and Vonetta McGee

programme.title: Precious Cargo (2016)
programme.desc: A thief is marked for death by a crime boss after a heist goes badly wrong. To win back his trust, she plans to steal a cargo of rare precious gems and recruits a former lover to carry out the job. However, as the robbery is put into action, nobody is sure who to trust. Crime thriller, starring Claire Forlani and Bruce Willis

programme.title: Blood and Money (2020)
programme.desc: Jim Reed is a lonely, retired Vietnam veteran who lives in his mobile home, and hunts deer in the snowy wilds of Allagash in northern Maine. Jim's life is turned upside down when he stumbles across a dead woman and a large sum of money. Co-writer/director John Barr's thriller, starring Tom Berenger, Kristen Hager and Paul Ben-Victor.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow patients at south-west London's St George's hospital on Harry and Meghan's wedding day in May 2018. As the happy couple tie the knot, patients and their relatives reflect on the meaning of lifelong love, devotion and commitment. Among those treated are David, 74, who is flown to St George's by air ambulance after falling from a ladder. Medics suspect internal bleeding and he is rushed to CT to assess the damage. His wife Lynda makes her way to the hospital as doctors try to prevent catastrophic blood loss

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Kain and David check for life-changing spinal injuries in a 62-year-old woman who's been thrown off her horse. Dr Jonathan and nurse Lucy detect a ticking time bomb in a woman who's been rushed in from the airport after she collapsed on a long-haul flight from the UK, but the life-saving medication she needs carries extra dangers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Croft Farm Park in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, where site wardens Jason and Michelle Jones are keen to show off their new luxury lodges

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests arrive at Harbour Vista in Poole, Dorset, where most of them have been expecting something lavish - so they are surprised to be staying in owner Steve Webster's house

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Heather and Sally from Brockley Hall Hotel want some answers about why one of their rooms didn't scrub up. Plus, Alistair from The Star Inn 1744 queries his guests' cleanliness comments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business manager Alison Bennett hosts the first dinner party in Glasgow, where she hopes that her Thai menu of chicken satay, red-roasted pork and chili chocolate combs will help to secure her the £1,000 prize. However, it remains to be seen whether any of her guests are able to use the chopsticks she has provided

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Butcher Graeme Curley hosts the second night in Glasgow, where he has planned a meaty menu complete with pork ribs. He hopes to wow his guests by serving steak - and by bringing some of his trade to the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Michelle Blackett is the host on day three in Glasgow, and hopes to impress the diners by preparing a menu of exceedingly well-appointed food. Over the course of the evening, Michelle's guests discover her hidden heritage, and hospitality student Erwin - who speaks five languages - does his best to add the 'Glaswegian' dialect to his arsenal

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ballet enthusiast and hospitality management student Erwin Orduz hosts the fourth dinner party in Glasgow and hopes to impress his guests with an evening of shocks and surprises. He attempts hotel-style presentation and serves up his meals in a dining room that has been decorated with a menagerie theme of animals and nakedness

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Yvonne Finlayson hosts the final night of the cooking competition in Glasgow, offering her guests a combination of 'scientifically-infused' food, high-octane entertainment and scintillating chat - plus a healthy dose of revelations - to try to claim the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Church Street Cobbles, a B&B that foodie Debbie Quinn and housekeeper, cook and cleaner Isobel Reisen recently opened above a barber shop in Macclesfield. Guests John and Joy are amazed by the cleanliness, but Steve and Verity aren't impressed with their bathroom. During an afternoon of foraging in the woods, Debbie and Isobel get competitive, while Arun and his sister Rashmi show off their skills. Expectations are high at breakfast, but Debbie's locally sourced produce comes under fire from Steve and Verity, and their feedback is hard to swallow

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to rock 'n' roll venue the Victoria Bikers Pub in Coalville, Leicestershire, where siblings John and Joy take a more laid back approach to running the business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Cranberries Hideaway in Kilmington, Devon, where owner Steve and his partner Verity hope the luxury touches will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests head to the Mehfil Hotel in Southall, London, where spiritual host Arun and his sister Rashmi are hoping to bring some Indian hospitality to the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for one last time to find out what they have been paid. Debbie and Isobel are keen to get to the bottom of some of the cleaning comments from Steve and Verity

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of first-time buyers who are struggling to find homes. In Southampton, Jenny and Tom are keen to move out of their cramped rental property and into a house of their own, but they are facing fierce competition and a fast market. Meanwhile, in the New Forest, Georgie and Will are desperate to live together after seven years of being a couple. However, with Will working in Belgium during the week, the pair are finding suitable properties are snapped up before they have even had the chance to view them

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: The new run of Britain's toughest music quiz continues, as Ken Bruce hosts the sixth heat, as five more players prove that they know their Chic from their Chicago

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: A guide to self-sufficient island life, from off-grid living on the stunning Scottish island of Gometra to a special branch of Hare Krishnas on Lough Erne in Northern Ireland. Meanwhile, on Sark, island life is the perfect fit for a young family who are building their own home, beekeeping and serving as their community's first responders

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras reveal how individuals adapt and survive in the face of adversity. Subjects include Paul, 60, who is rushed to A&E after colliding with a van. Doctors are concerned that he may have serious injuries to his pelvis and spine. There's also a profile of four-year-old Jeremy, who is struggling to breathe. He suffers from a series of chronic conditions, including microcephaly and epilepsy

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Chaos reigns in a hotel as one person is accused of assaulting another, and the police are called in while paramedics try to treat both parties at the same time. A trip over a pet dog leaves a woman with a wound on her arm that won't stop bleeding. Plus, a 76-year-old woman with fluctuating blood pressure confides in the paramedics that she's grieving the loss of her husband

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: A guide to self-sufficient island life, from off-grid living on the stunning Scottish island of Gometra to a special branch of Hare Krishnas on Lough Erne in Northern Ireland. Meanwhile, on Sark, island life is the perfect fit for a young family who are building their own home, beekeeping and serving as their community's first responders

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras reveal how individuals adapt and survive in the face of adversity. Subjects include Paul, 60, who is rushed to A&E after colliding with a van. Doctors are concerned that he may have serious injuries to his pelvis and spine. There's also a profile of four-year-old Jeremy, who is struggling to breathe. He suffers from a series of chronic conditions, including microcephaly and epilepsy

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow patients at south-west London's St George's hospital on Harry and Meghan's wedding day in May 2018. As the happy couple tie the knot, patients and their relatives reflect on the meaning of lifelong love, devotion and commitment. Among those treated are David, 74, who is flown to St George's by air ambulance after falling from a ladder. Medics suspect internal bleeding and he is rushed to CT to assess the damage. His wife Lynda makes her way to the hospital as doctors try to prevent catastrophic blood loss

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their North Yorkshire tour the campers visit Masons Campsite near Skipton for an exhilarating stay involving river swimming, trout fishing, cricket and croissants

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a glass-top coffee table, and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Surrey and Hampshire. Simon builds a huge kitchen table from discarded rafters and gives a 1970s campervan a new lease of life. Henry hankers after an American tractor and Royal Enfield motorbike and sidecar

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Inn at the Park in Aberdeen, where for owners Ronnie and Steph Caird, it's all about keeping it in the family. When the guests arrive, design-conscious father and son Steve and Allard take a trip back in time, and John isn't flushed with praise for his bathroom. At dinner, John reveals his culinary background, piling on the pressure for Ronnie to deliver a good breakfast. Fiona and Shauna's sizeable confession raises eyebrows, while in the morning, Ronnie has a breakfast to forget and the bathroom blues leave Ronnie and Steph seeking answers from their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Ingliston Country Club in Renfrewshire, where events manager Shauna Kirk and sales manager Fiona Gallagher prove a force to be reckoned with. Guests Steve and Allard aren't feeling the dated décor, and John proves that one size doesn't fit all. Ronnie and Steph are blown away by the competition, but they think that perfection comes at a price

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit, the group heads to 1692 Wasdale in the Lake District, where owners Steve and Allard Newell have proudly built their B&B from the ground up

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay at the Lynbar Hotel in Blackpool, where Ronnie and Steph have parking problems, while confident owner John O'Donnell boasts of serving the best breakfast in town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Inn at the Park owners Ronnie and Steph Caird are intent on clearing up John's issues with the toilet

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter Dale Harvey hosts the first dinner party in Derby, where he hopes to impress aspiring thespian Beth Dunmore, business support manager Jo-Anna, mother-of-three Ondine Shardlow, and triathlete David Morris with a wrestling-themed extravaganza featuring large men in tight lycra. However, a fractious royal debate dampens the mood

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business support manager Jo-Anna hosts the second dinner party in Derby, and hopes to wow her guests with a glitz and glam evening - complete with ball gowns and poetry. However, David is hoping for a more lively night - and his antics do not impress fellow contestant Dale

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR whizz Beth Dunmore hosts the third night in Derby, and she hopes to impress her guests with her vaguely Middle Eastern menu. However, she has her work cut out when it comes to the fussy David Morris, whose confidence seems to be growing as the week progresses. Beth has a fan in cruise ship connoisseur Jo-Anna, though, while single mum Ondine Shardlow is disappointed with the level of competition and thinks she has the week in the bag

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ondine Shardlow hosts the fourth dinner party in Derby, hoping to impress her guests with a flavoursome Greek holiday-inspired menu. However, her carefully planned evening takes a turn for the worse when she manages to insult Dale, and Jo-Anna displays some questionable table manners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the dinner party contest in Derby and the turn of triathlete David Morris to serve his offerings. Ondine is not impressed by his small portions, big flavours approach, and is even less satisfied with Jo-Anna's behaviour during the week. The host throws an impromptu work-out class where wrestling promoter Dale Harvey is put through his paces, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and her friend Anny Harrison host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire. Chris Witton and Saroop Ram from the Swan Hotel feel right at home, but tech-savvy Colin and Ben Warburg from Scalford Hall Hotel fail to connect from the start. During the afternoon's hay-bale race, youngsters Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker from the Abbey Hotel fail to stack up to the challenge. At dinner, Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. Colin's feedback leaves unanswered questions for Mandy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Witton and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that straightforward value for money will win them the competition, as they host at the Swan Hotel in Telford. A Yorkshire pudding-making competition leaves confident cooks Mandy and Anny thinking there's more to youngsters Charlie and Lauren than meets the eye. At dinner, Rammy opens up about his troubled past. Colin has a rude awakening in the morning. At feedback time, Chris has a change of heart about some of his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin Warburg and his student son Ben hope that their 81-room country pile - Scalford Hall Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire - will wow their rivals. However, Chris and Rammy are still smarting from their feedback and think that Colin is playing games. After an afternoon crate stacking competition on the hotel's high wire course, Colin gets a grilling at dinner. A lukewarm reaction to breakfast only adds to Colin's woes and when he sees his feedback he suspects that retribution is at hand

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by confident young colleagues Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker. However when Charlie and Lauren's guests arrive, Colin and Ben feel the squeeze and Chris and Rammy find themselves in a sticky situation. On an afternoon at the archery range, scores are settled. At dinner, straight-talking Chris can't help but be impressed, but when the conversation turns to parking, the guests are in a jam with their hosts. Later, Colin's feedback leaves Lauren wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to settle some scores. Laskill Country House host Mandy wants to crack where she went wrong with breakfast and why Colin and Ben failed to connect with her, while Chris and Rammy from The Swan Hotel wish to question Lauren on her room flaws and get to the bottom of Colin's bedroom nightmares

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp meets Stuart and Lara, who want to be under the same roof after two years of being together, but living 100 miles apart. The pair look in the vicinity of Amersham, while Phil Spencer meets Randhir and Sheetal. They want to swap London living for village life in Berkshire before baby number two arrives in five weeks

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce hosts the seventh heat, as five more players are put through their paces and the toughest music questions on TV

programme.title: Ancient Greece by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Alice is in the Penteli hills in Athens, at a site known as the Sanctuary of Dionysus, the god of wine. Local legend has it that on a night of drink and revelry a man called Thespis created what we now know as theatre. In a surprise invitation to meet the Greek Minister of Culture, Alice discusses the return of the Elgin Marbles

programme.title: Castle Secrets
programme.sub-title: Gateway to Hell; Monk's Curse; The Queen and the Concubine
programme.desc: A look at Houska Castle, a gothic chapel erected over a supposed gateway to hell and how a property dispute between an eminent family became the catalyst for tragedy. Plus, exploring how a renaissance chateau provided an opulent backdrop for a bitter rivalry between powerful women

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition features stories of human compassion and kindness in the most challenging circumstances. Allen, 82, has injured his chest after a dizzy spell caused him to fall down 13 steps. As son Graham waits nervously for doctors to assess Allen's injuries, Graham describes his dad's strength and resilience in carrying the family through dark times, and how precious the bond between father and son can be

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow Aydigul, 38, who has suspected sepsis following major abdominal surgery. Her sister is at her bedside throughout, and discusses their childhood in Tajikistan and her extraordinary strength in the face of adversity. Plus, emergency consultant Ahmed rushes to save the life of a woman who has an abdominal aortic aneurysm

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Tania is rushed to St George's with life-threatening injuries, having been knocked over while crossing a road, while semi-professional footballer Lilli arrives in A&E after being elbowed in the face during a match. Seventy-seven-year-old Edwin is rushed to resus bleeding from a tumour on his neck, and as the medical team examines the wound, his partner Jeanette explains how their romance blossomed in later life. When a maxillofacial specialist arrives to plan the next stage of Edwin's treatment, it forces his family to confront the very painful truth

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Chaos reigns in a hotel as one person is accused of assaulting another, and the police are called in while paramedics try to treat both parties at the same time. programme.desc: Camping holidaymakers Sugapuff and Therryi, Nik and Harriet, and Emmy and Simon pitch up at a working farm on the edge of Ilkley Moor, West Yorkshire. Shearing sheep and feeding lambs are among the new experiences for this crowd of campsite critics

programme.desc: PR whizz Beth Dunmore hosts the third night in Derby, and she hopes to impress her guests with her vaguely Middle Eastern menu. However, she has her work cut out when it comes to the fussy David Morris, whose confidence seems to be growing as the week progresses. Beth has a fan in cruise ship connoisseur Jo-Anna, though, while single mum Ondine Shardlow is disappointed with the level of competition and thinks she has the week in the bag

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ondine Shardlow hosts the fourth dinner party in Derby, hoping to impress her guests with a flavoursome Greek holiday-inspired menu. However, her carefully planned evening takes a turn for the worse when she manages to insult Dale, and Jo-Anna displays some questionable table manners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final day of the dinner party contest in Derby and the turn of triathlete David Morris to serve his offerings. Ondine is not impressed by his small portions, big flavours approach, and is even less satisfied with Jo-Anna's behaviour during the week. The host throws an impromptu work-out class where wrestling promoter Dale Harvey is put through his paces, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and her friend Anny Harrison host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire. Chris Witton and Saroop Ram from the Swan Hotel feel right at home, but tech-savvy Colin and Ben Warburg from Scalford Hall Hotel fail to connect from the start. During the afternoon's hay-bale race, youngsters Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker from the Abbey Hotel fail to stack up to the challenge. At dinner, Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. Colin's feedback leaves unanswered questions for Mandy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Witton and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that straightforward value for money will win them the competition, as they host at the Swan Hotel in Telford. A Yorkshire pudding-making competition leaves confident cooks Mandy and Anny thinking there's more to youngsters Charlie and Lauren than meets the eye. At dinner, Rammy opens up about his troubled past. Colin has a rude awakening in the morning. At feedback time, Chris has a change of heart about some of his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin Warburg and his student son Ben hope that their 81-room country pile - Scalford Hall Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire - will wow their rivals. However, Chris and Rammy are still smarting from their feedback and think that Colin is playing games. After an afternoon crate stacking competition on the hotel's high wire course, Colin gets a grilling at dinner. A lukewarm reaction to breakfast only adds to Colin's woes and when he sees his feedback he suspects that retribution is at hand

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by confident young colleagues Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker. However when Charlie and Lauren's guests arrive, Colin and Ben feel the squeeze and Chris and Rammy find themselves in a sticky situation. On an afternoon at the archery range, scores are settled. At dinner, straight-talking Chris can't help but be impressed, but when the conversation turns to parking, the guests are in a jam with their hosts. Later, Colin's feedback leaves Lauren wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to settle some scores. Laskill Country House host Mandy wants to crack where she went wrong with breakfast and why Colin and Ben failed to connect with her, while Chris and Rammy from The Swan Hotel wish to question Lauren on her room flaws and get to the bottom of Colin's bedroom nightmares

programme.title: The Rosenbergs: Atomic Spies
programme.desc: How, in 1950 with America in the throes of the Red Scare, seemingly ordinary couple Julius and Ethel Rosenberg found themselves the target of anti-Communist hysteria. Arrested by the FBI and accused of passing secret information to the USSR, they maintained their innocence while the media and public opinion seemed to condemned them. Their trial did nothing to change this and ended in a death sentence. Thirty years later, declassified files revealed that Ethel was not a spy, though Julius did commit espionage - primarily as a recruiter. Using archival footage, this documentary revisits the intriguing case

programme.title: Weathered: Earth's Extremes

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Germany's devastating offensive against the Allies, their army prepares to capture the entire British army trapped at the port at Dunkirk. programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: In September 1939 a German U-boat fires its first torpedo, setting in motion the longest continuous battle of the war. A cat and mouse game of epic proportions ensues as German U-boats and allied forces engage in a five-year battle for supremacy in the Atlantic

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: With Britain standing alone, Churchill realises maintaining control of the vital oil supply line through the Suez Canal is critical to his nation?s hopes. After the fall of the strategically important port of Tobruk, Rommel only has the defensive line at El Alamein left to cross. Britain?s General Montgomery drives Rommel back from El Alamein, but that is only the beginning; America?s rookie troops make landfall in North Africa and join the fight

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory
programme.desc: In the aftermath of his defeat at Stalingrad, Hitler knows he must deliver a knockout blow to regain the initiative against his nemesis, Stalin. As his physical and mental abilities start to wane, Hitler prepares for battle at the bulge in the lines at Kursk with powerful new tanks backed up by some of the best troops of the war

programme.title: WWII in Colour: Road to Victory

programme.title: WWI: The Last Tommies
programme.desc: Veterans of the First World War recall their experiences, with archive footage used to illustrate events, beginning with the first two years of the war in 1914 and '15. programme.title: America's Great War 1917-1918

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Retired heptathlon star Jessica Ennis-Hill sets out to discover the truth behind a family mystery concerning her great-great-grandmother. When his father, Jess's great-grandfather was a child his mother Emily Maud, known as Maud, walked out. The family never talked about Maud, and Jess's grandfather has no idea what became of her. Jess wants to investigate what could have happened to make her two-time great-grandmother abandon her children and effectively be written out of the family's history. She also examines her Jamaican four-time great-grandfather's journey from enslavement to land ownership

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Ralf Little heads to the Orkney Islands off the north coast of Scotland to investigate his grandfather Arthur's experience during the Second World War. He is astonished to discover that Arthur was caught up in one of the most important battles of the war. On another branch of the family tree, Ralf is thrilled to confirm a family rumour that he is linked to a Welsh international footballer - his great grandfather. On returning to his home town of Manchester, the actor is delighted to learn that his four-times great grandfather played a key role in the industrial development of the city

programme.desc: Alan's wife Sarah inherits shares worth £250,000, which will allow her the financial comfort of filing for divorce. The ambitious politician desperately wants her to stay by his side as her father is an influential Conservative party figure and a helpful backdrop for his career, so he takes steps to ensure the value of her portfolio takes a sudden tumble. Rik Mayall stars

programme.title: The Teacher (1974)
programme.desc: A man embarks on an affair with a teacher while her husband is away. But neither realises that she has a stalker - an obsessive maniac who also has a grudge against the hapless teenager. Drama, starring Angel Tompkins, Jay North and Anthony James

programme.title: Sasquatch (1976)
programme.desc: A team of scientists searches for the elusive Bigfoot-type creature in a dense forest in the Pacific Northwest and finds more than they expected. Pseudo-documentary horror, starring George Lauris

programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude

programme.desc: Ken and White Lightning rescue two damsels in distress. Stars Michael Elphick

programme.title: The New Statesman
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic political satire, starring Rik Mayall. Newly elected MP Alan B'Stard has won the largest majority in parliament after sabotaging his rivals, but the police chief constable has evidence of the scheming politician's misdeeds and starts blackmailing him. programme.title: Swindlers
programme.desc: The story of Dublin solicitor Thomas Byrne, who stole ?52 million from the banks and took ownership of 12 of his victims' houses in one of the biggest cases of white-collar crime in the history of the Irish State. This documentary charts how the solicitor scammed his neighbours and clients by transferring a dozen properties into his own name and lending from multiple banks using the houses as collateral

programme.title: Prime Time
programme.desc: In-depth analysis of current affairs and topical reports presented by Miriam O'Callaghan and Sarah McInerney

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: With guests Mark Hamill, Mia Threapleton and Masai Ujiri

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Shortscreen
programme.desc: Short documentary about the last days of comedian Kevin Gildea's bookshop on George's Street, Dún Laoghaire, which opened during the pandemic and closed in early 2023

programme.title: Changing Ends
programme.desc: The Close has a problem with knickers being snatched from washing lines and windows being peeped into, so Alan eagerly decides to play detective, even if it clashes with his 12th birthday. Comedy, starring Oliver Savell and Shaun Dooley

programme.title: The Korean War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary looks at how, after the death of Stalin, an Armistice was signed and the border between North and South Korea was designated near the 38th parallel

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: TK comes face to face with a mystery woman, Desi blurs boundaries, and Monique mourns her loss

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie blows up at David, Levi fights to save a life, and Harper gets an unexpected message

programme.title: Back from the Brink
programme.desc: At the steeple of Saint Fin Barre's Cathedral in the heart of Cork City, Derek Mooney witnesses the conservation efforts of Sam Bayley and Alan McCarthy, who have helped a pair of peregrine falcons nest. In Slovenia, Derek meets a team of botanists from University of Ljubljana Gardens who joined forces with the city council to transform bus shelter roofs into roof gardens.

programme.title: Songs of Ireland
programme.desc: Pat Shortt and Mike Hanrahan conclude their journey around Ireland. The duo start in the town of Keady in Armagh, where they perform Four Green Fields with Ciara O'Neill. Pat and Mike move on to County Down to perform The Star of the County Down with singer-songwriter Sarah McCreedy. In Belfast's County Antrim, they meet Winnie Ama and come up with a fresh take on I'll Tell Me Ma

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier, Freddy and Roz go back to Seattle for a KACL anniversary special, Dr Crane reconnects with a former caller whose life went off the rails after he took Frasier's advice. Meanwhile, Alan's lack of appreciation drives David to quit. Kelsey Grammer directs and stars

programme.title: Mayflies
programme.desc: Moral dilemmas occupy Jimmy as he organises the Switzerland trip, but tempers flare when Tully's wife Anna discovers the plan and declares she will not support Tully's assisted dying. The concluding part of Andrea Gibb's adaptation of Andrew O'Hagan's novel, starring Tony Curran, Martin Compston and Ashley Jensen

programme.title: Sport vs Money with Simon Jordan
programme.desc: Inside the high-stakes world of football's power players, from the Glazers to Abramovich, billion-dollar bets, and boardroom drama

programme.title: Picasso: The Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: An exploration of the life, death and legacy of Pablo Picasso, beginning with his years as an emerging artist in Paris as his renown quickly grows. He meets his first love, Fernande, and starts the pattern of his lifetime, as he soon falls in love with another woman, ballerina Olga Khokhlova

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: it's a big weekend for the Jessops as Cherry and Robin's wedding has fallen on the same day as Paul's police training graduation. programme.title: Classic Albums
