programme.sub-title: Mitch's Son and the Unconditional Approval of a Government Agency
programme.desc: The IRS accuses Sheldon of making a mistake and he stops at nothing to prove them wrong, while Dale is forced to get a colonoscopy and tries to convince Meemaw to join him

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Virus, Heartbreak and a World of Possibilities
programme.desc: Mary and Meemaw takes Brenda on a girls' night out, while Sheldon is caught in a moral dilemma when offered a bootleg copy of a computer game he cannot afford. Missy ask Georgie to take her and Marcus on a secret date

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette find it upsetting to leave baby Halley at the nursery when Bernadette returns to work at the end of her maternity leave. The gang's university colleague Bert the geologist introduces them to his attractive new girlfriend Rebecca

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer Dr Ramona Nowitzki resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy must decide whether or not to marry Sheldon and gives him an answer to his proposal. Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. With guest stars Laurie Metcalf, Riki Lindhome and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard angers the university - and the entire physics community - when he gives an embarrassing interview. Amy and Bernadette bond over having to hide their success from Sheldon and Howard. Ira Flatow and Regina King guest star

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Part four of four. Meri and Kody talk about their dark times in Vegas. Kody accuses the other wives of using Robyn as a scapegoat.

programme.title: Obese and Expecting
programme.desc: Documentary following four morbidly obese pregnant women as they suffer health crises and relationship breakdowns, all while striving to deliver healthy babies

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Giant cauliflower-shaped bumps cover Elizabeth's head. Jamaal has been growing a strange bump on the side of his backside since he was a boy

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dr. Lee meets a patient with a big bump on his forehead. Plus, 30-year-old Shelby has developed mysterious bumps all over her body.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Katrina suffers from oozing, smelly boils that have appeared all over her body. Plus, a patient with Neurofibromatosis seeks help from Dr. Lee

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Mike gained over 700lbs after his football dreams were dashed by multiple concussions. Now he must find a new purpose in life to avoid succumbing to pain and regret

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at a wedding dress shop catering to larger customers

programme.title: Curvy Brides Boutique
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed emotional wreck Sally is in desperate need of Jo and Al's help, so they head off to the wedding to offer her support

programme.title: Some Like It Sexy (1969)
programme.desc: A young man in swinging London has a series of sexual misadventures with women from all walks of life, including a hippie, a high society lady's daughter, and a salvation army officer. Erotic comedy, starring Christopher Matthews and Yolande Turner

programme.title: Musketeer
programme.desc: An old musketeer meets a youth and two scoundrels on the road to Paris. Short drama, starring Kevin McNally, Andrew Lewis and Charlie Allen

programme.title: House of Whipcord (1974)
programme.desc: A French model befriends a strange man at a party and agrees to come home to meet his parents. She soon finds herself trapped in a disused prison taken over by a puritanical elderly couple, who seek to punish women whom they judge as immoral. Horror, starring Penny Irving, Barbara Markham, Patrick Barr and Ray Brooks

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Philip Serrell, Tony Wong and Micaela Sharp search Stratford-upon-Avon for items, choosing a bottle-corking machine, some lamps and old furniture in the hope of turning a profit

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie and Chris are in Gloucester to create a low maintenance, Scandinavian-inspired garden for Indie and Nathan's first home together

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Becky and Paul and their two children live on the edge of the picturesque Quantocks near Taunton, Somerset, but are struggling with the strange dog-legged shape of their new-build garden. Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull use a £6,000 budget to transform its landscaping and introduce a cracked paving patio and bespoke seating area, with a dry stone wall façade. While Chris drives the main garden build, Charlie get to tackle the dog-leg, which Chris has designed to be a fun kids area with a water play area and wooden musical instruments

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team are in Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, where they meet deaf couple Asif Iqbal and wife Sabina. The green-fingered experts attempt to turn a boring lawn and crumbling patio into a Bollywood dream garden with an outdoor kitchen for Asif, Sabina and their family

programme.title: Futtock's End (1970)
programme.desc: A general invites a motley group of guests to stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Silent comedy. starring Ronnie Barker, Michael Hordern and Roger Livesey

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as millionaires, private collectors and antique dealers compete to buy extraordinary items. Banksy experts take a risk on a piece of wall featuring work attributed to the anonymous artist and Tommy Cooper's iconic fez goes on sale. Plus, a jar of pickled pig foetuses and an array of Buzzcocks memorabilia

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman visits a couple in Southampton, who have an unfinished bathroom and building site for a home

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave Wellman who demonstrates how to create more space in a boxroom and make it into a into a proper bedroom

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: A mysterious pencil sketch of an anonymous couple by acclaimed artist Sean Keating enchants rival bidders Helen and David, but only auctioneer Michael's hammer can seal its fate. Gloster house owners and self-confessed auction addicts Tom and Mary are on the hunt for some antique gems for their 300-year-old home, while cabinetmaker Kieran restores a classic Victorian Cheval mirror for the sale

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans who've turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: New Home DIY

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Mark Evans meets more people who aspire to live in their ultimate waterside dream home. Simon and Mary Sparrow live on a barge in Beccles, Suffolk, with their son Nate and their two cats. The Sparrows have been running a boatyard for nearly 10 years, specialising in refurbishing and renting out floating homes to holidaymakers. Now they're designing and building a new, one-of-a-kind floating home for themselves - a futuristic-looking floating pod, drawing on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The castle manager John and his team are awake before sunrise to welcome the crew of the ITV show Lorraine, who are broadcasting live from the castle's famous grand saloon to mark the release of the second Downton Abbey movie. Unfortunately, the show's visit coincides with the busiest day of the year for coach parties and it's a race against the clock to get the crew out before the first bus load arrives

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of locals living along Yorkshire's coastline. This episode features members of the Robson family from Bridlington, who've been fishing the North Sea for generations, as they head up the coast to Whitby for a boat repair. Volunteers at Bempton Cliffs work to protect and preserve almost half a million seabirds, and a group of sea swimmers take a full-moon sea swim at Scarborough

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A kayaker is stuck fast with his head underwater in the rapids, leaving his friends in a race against time to save him. Plus, a car collides with a train on a level crossing - and the driver is trapped inside. Presented by Nick Knowles

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled en route to the contemplation garden, giving Jack plenty to think about as he tries to figure out which member of the group was responsible. The problem is, they were all meditating at the time of the murder, and are able to provide one another with alibis, so how could any of them be the killer? To add to the DI's problems, he is struggling to come up with a speech to honour Commissioner Patterson at an award ceremony. Caribbean whodunit, starring Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jack's home comforts

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects Violet Hart has ties to a conman's murder, Ogden flirts with danger and a team member is abducted

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a shocking death, Murdoch is convinced that someone close to Station House No 4 is involved

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A vaudeville comic's death leads Murdoch to suspect that Charlie Chaplin was the intended target. Meanwhile, Henry Higgins is elated to hear Ruth's news

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A crime novelist pushes her way into Murdoch's investigation of an attorney murdered at his own retirement party. Guest starring Sally Lindsay

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mallory and Father Brown go missing, and it is up to the gang to save them from a man hell-bent on revenge. Mark Williams and Jack Deam star in the crime drama

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team investigates when an entrepreneur is found dead in a ravine, but things take a turn when his family's digital marketing guru suddenly disappears. Neville's mum Melanie arrives on the island and teams up with Catherine to take the Saint Marie dating scene by storm and the Commissioner's big Christmas lights switch-on comes to an awkward stop. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington, Doon Mackichan and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank O'Toole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victim's wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jack's home comforts

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Murder on the Day of the Dead
programme.desc: It seems somebody has taken the island's Day of the Dead celebrations a little too literally when a man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked. When she turns up dead, suspicion falls upon her friends and acquaintances at the nearby yacht club - her husband Finn, club secretary Charlotte and chairman Hugh. However, Jack's curiosity is piqued by a yellow butterfly found on the victim's clothing and he calls upon Commissioner Selwyn's knowledge of such matters. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring John Sessions and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled en route to the contemplation garden, giving Jack plenty to think about as he tries to figure out which member of the group was responsible. The problem is, they were all meditating at the time of the murder, and are able to provide one another with alibis, so how could any of them be the killer? To add to the DI's problems, he is struggling to come up with a speech to honour Commissioner Patterson at an award ceremony. Caribbean whodunit, starring Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal O'Hanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JP's past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dad's surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean cops enter the high-pressure world of fine dining when a famous chef is found stabbed to death the morning after the opening of his new restaurant. It proves to be a tricky investigation as the body was stored in a freezer, so the time of death cannot be identified - and when it turns out he was quite a hot-head in the kitchen, all his staff come under suspicion. Away from the case, Dwayne meets his match in the shape of a troublesome schoolboy, Florence has one last lesson in love for the inspector and JP makes a life-changing decision. Tara FitzGerald and Martin Compston guest star

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest encounters a man who intends to solve his father's murder a year earlier with the use of his brand-new invention - a time machine. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Suspicions are aroused when the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a wanton woman. Drama, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal O'Hanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JP's past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects Violet Hart has ties to a conman's murder, Ogden flirts with danger and a team member is abducted

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a shocking death, Murdoch is convinced that someone close to Station House No 4 is involved

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A vaudeville comic's death leads Murdoch to suspect that Charlie Chaplin was the intended target. Meanwhile, Henry Higgins is elated to hear Ruth's news

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.sub-title: He Ain't Heavy He's My Brother
programme.desc: When a Japanese scholar is kidnapped, Inspector Choi suspects his estranged brother is involved

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A crime novelist pushes her way into Murdoch's investigation of an attorney murdered at his own retirement party. Guest starring Sally Lindsay

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mallory and Father Brown go missing, and it is up to the gang to save them from a man hell-bent on revenge. Mark Williams and Jack Deam star in the crime drama

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team investigates when an entrepreneur is found dead in a ravine, but things take a turn when his family's digital marketing guru suddenly disappears. Neville's mum Melanie arrives on the island and teams up with Catherine to take the Saint Marie dating scene by storm and the Commissioner's big Christmas lights switch-on comes to an awkward stop. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little, Don Warrington, Doon Mackichan and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank O'Toole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victim's wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team become embroiled in the mysterious world of faith healing when a blind woman dies while being treated by renowned healer Steadman King. When it turns out the victim was poisoned, all eyes turn to Steadman and his cup of holy water. But how could the prime suspect have carried out the deed in front of an audience without anyone noticing? Meanwhile, JP is put through his paces when Pico the police dog joins the team on a week-long trial, and Florence tries to recreate some of Jack's home comforts

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.sub-title: Murder on the Day of the Dead
programme.desc: It seems somebody has taken the island's Day of the Dead celebrations a little too literally when a man receives a voicemail from his wife saying she is being attacked. When she turns up dead, suspicion falls upon her friends and acquaintances at the nearby yacht club - her husband Finn, club secretary Charlotte and chairman Hugh. However, Jack's curiosity is piqued by a yellow butterfly found on the victim's clothing and he calls upon Commissioner Selwyn's knowledge of such matters. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring John Sessions and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled en route to the contemplation garden, giving Jack plenty to think about as he tries to figure out which member of the group was responsible. The problem is, they were all meditating at the time of the murder, and are able to provide one another with alibis, so how could any of them be the killer? To add to the DI's problems, he is struggling to come up with a speech to honour Commissioner Patterson at an award ceremony. Caribbean whodunit, starring Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dad's surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A marine salvage team unearth the legendary Saint Marie silver, but their celebration comes to an abrupt halt when their captain is found dead on the beach with a stab wound to his chest. With the captain's son Sam, wife Naomi and assistant Addison having watertight alibis, attention turns to rival treasure hunter Newton Farrell. Meanwhile, Dwayne is on best man duty as he organises the ultimate stag party for a terrified JP, and Florence is determined to find out what Humphrey got up to the night before his own wedding. Caribbean crime drama, guest starring Jack Donnelly (Atlantis) and Jill Halfpenny (Humans)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are comedian James Acaster, singer-songwriter Lily Allen, Peter Kay's Car Share star Sian Gibson and former Slade frontman Noddy Holder. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Gyles Brandreth, Victoria Coren Mitchell and Jimmy Carr join series regular Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme of 'not nearly' in an extended edition of the comedy panel show. As usual, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window in this quiz, in which the questions are so difficult points are awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sonubi hosts the comedy show filmed at London's Hammersmith Apollo, introducing stand-up routines by fellow comedians Troy Hawke and Olga Koch

programme.title: Live at the Apollo

programme.desc: Zuu and the boys welcome comedian Ellie Taylor to Mandem HQ and give her a B&B-style breakfast buffet with a Peking duck twist

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Special in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three used, V8-engined sports cars on a gruelling road trip covering 1,600 miles through Patagonia to the world's southernmost city. Having encountered stunning landscapes, mechanical mishaps and dreadful roads on their journey through Argentina, the trio's adventure is brought to a dramatic climax by a terrifying turn of events

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to boost the British economy by embarking on a trade mission to India. Equipped with three old British cars and a range of uniquely British products, they set off on an epic road trip across one of the world's most fascinating and challenging countries, devotedly promoting Britain - with distinctly mixed results

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.sub-title: Top Gear: Driving Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Chris Harris, Paddy McGuiness and Freddie Flintoff aren't choosing their own cars, but instead choosing for one another. After unwrapping their presents in the Welsh village of Bethlehem, the trio set off on a yuletide trek across Britain, stopping off to play the game of 'High-Speed Visual Charades' and deliver an enormous tree to the Unesco World Heritage city of Bath. Then it's time for the presenters to visit the Top Gear test track, transformed into a winter wonderland of speed

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Dave's caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neil's christening. The event means a big reunion for the gang, at which Smithy receives surprising news from Nessa, and Stacey has a special request for her husband

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessa's plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bryn is in his element as he awaits the arrival of the Essex boys, who are having a big night out in Cardiff and staying for a sleepover, but Smithy is concerned about seeing Nessa again after their last meeting. Meanwhile, Stacey tells Gavin about a worrying discovery, and Pam and Mick discuss their plans for a new conservatory

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Billericay as Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows. Gavin feels uncomfortable about Gwen and Bryn knowing the details of his sex life, and Dave hears about the shocking events of the curry night. Meanwhile, Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship when he makes a staggering suggestion

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bank Holiday Monday sees the Essex contingent arrive for a sunny day at the beach in Barry. Gavin has a heart-to-heart with his dad, which gives him much to think about, while a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden and Ruth Jones star

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Preparations for Nessa and Dave's wedding are in full swing, Stacey has life-changing news for Gavin, and Bryn and Jason put their big secret to bed once and for all. Finally, the wedding arrives and, as Nessa prepares to make her way to the church, Smithy takes the opportunity to have one last chat. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden, Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon star

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Countdown dictionary expert Susie Dent, comedian Bob Mortimer and TV presenters Ore Oduba and Stacey Solomon join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedians Dave Gorman and Omid Djalili, TV presenter Davina McCall and journalist Janet Street-Porter join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show, in which they try to dupe their opponents with plausible lies about themselves. Presented by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Kevin Eldon, Sarah Keyworth, Laila Rouass and John Whaite test their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games across the week

programme.title: The Way Out
programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc sends the teams on a daring gallery break-in, cracking cryptic clues and dodging security in a race to steal the Mona Lisa in the fastest time possible

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Amol Rajan hosts an extended episode of the satirical quiz, with team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton joined by actor and comedian Miles Jupp and former MP Andrea Jenkyns

programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the week's news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain looks back on the latest events in news and politics, with the help of Eshaan Akbar, Angela Barnes, Ed Gamble, Rhys James and Sindhu Vee and regular panellist Hugh Dennis. As usual, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on one another. First shown in November

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers find a suspicious compartment within the trailer of a truck returning to Texas, and a man hides over 300 cheap forms of medication about his person in Progreso

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage head out on a mission that is run with a strict time constraint and difficult budget circumstances

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef continues his 'journey without maps', leaving the main routes and tourist hotspots behind to embark on a personal road trip along picturesque and remote backroads. Here, he heads through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura - famous for Comte cheese and home to his favourite French dish of choucroute garni. He then begins to head inland, visiting Burgundy for a memorable glass of Auxey-Duresses wine, and sampling oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the French/Swiss border, he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Actress Olivia Colman, JLS member Aston Merrygold, comedian Jon Richardson and wildlife presenter Michaela Strachan join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second leg of Simon's journey begins at the Giant's Causeway, before visiting a kelp farm on Rathlin Island. He heads to the Dark Hedges in Co Antrim, one of the filming locations from Game of Thrones, and visits Belfast for the July 12 parades, discovering how the event has divided the city. He also learns more about Oliver Cromwell's influence on Ireland, attends the Gaze film festival, and meets monkeys at an animal sanctuary in the Wicklow mountains

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team proves that bad vehicles still exist, Jeremy Clarkson makes the case for the Ford Mustang as the greatest car of all time, and Starsky and Hutch actor David Soul is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson road-tests the Jaguar XJR to see how it compares with the VW Phaeton, Richard Hammond recalls why the Mk2 was a landmark in motoring and the Aston Martin DB7 GT is pushed to the limit. Boris Johnson is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate British beef, using it in a suet pudding and making oxtail soup. They visit a farmer who is focusing on the future with his wagyu cattle, discover the history of the much-maligned dish tripe and learn how to roast a whole ox

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: The chef continues his 'journey without maps', leaving the main routes and tourist hotspots behind to embark on a personal road trip along picturesque and remote backroads. Here, he heads through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura - famous for Comte cheese and home to his favourite French dish of choucroute garni. He then begins to head inland, visiting Burgundy for a memorable glass of Auxey-Duresses wine, and sampling oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the French/Swiss border, he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.desc: Mel Giedroyc traps the teams in an off-the-scale world where nothing is as it seems, forcing them to decipher distorted clues and tackle a ticking time bomb.

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: David Mitchell, Noel Fielding and Holly Walsh join Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme of 'night' in an extended edition of the panel show. programme.desc: Special in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three used, V8-engined sports cars on a gruelling road trip covering 1,600 miles through Patagonia to the world's southernmost city. Having encountered stunning landscapes, mechanical mishaps and dreadful roads on their journey through Argentina, the trio's adventure is brought to a dramatic climax by a terrifying turn of events

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May set out to boost the British economy by embarking on a trade mission to India. Equipped with three old British cars and a range of uniquely British products, they set off on an epic road trip across one of the world's most fascinating and challenging countries, devotedly promoting Britain - with distinctly mixed results

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.sub-title: Top Gear: Driving Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Chris Harris, Paddy McGuiness and Freddie Flintoff aren't choosing their own cars, but instead choosing for one another. After unwrapping their presents in the Welsh village of Bethlehem, the trio set off on a yuletide trek across Britain, stopping off to play the game of 'High-Speed Visual Charades' and deliver an enormous tree to the Unesco World Heritage city of Bath. Then it's time for the presenters to visit the Top Gear test track, transformed into a winter wonderland of speed

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin starts his job in Cardiff and, while Stacey is thrilled to be back in Wales, Smithy has to come to terms with living in Essex without his best friend. Nessa has taken up residence in Dave's caravan in Sully and is getting ready for Neil's christening. The event means a big reunion for the gang, at which Smithy receives surprising news from Nessa, and Stacey has a special request for her husband

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Dave is unhappy about Nessa's plans to let Smithy see the baby, while Stacey ensures Gavin sticks to his promise as she tries to find a new job. Meanwhile, Dawn and Pete join Pam and Mick for a beer and curry night. Comedy, starring Joanna Page and Mathew Horne

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bryn is in his element as he awaits the arrival of the Essex boys, who are having a big night out in Cardiff and staying for a sleepover, but Smithy is concerned about seeing Nessa again after their last meeting. Meanwhile, Stacey tells Gavin about a worrying discovery, and Pam and Mick discuss their plans for a new conservatory

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Billericay as Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows. Gavin feels uncomfortable about Gwen and Bryn knowing the details of his sex life, and Dave hears about the shocking events of the curry night. Meanwhile, Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship when he makes a staggering suggestion

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey
programme.desc: Bank Holiday Monday sees the Essex contingent arrive for a sunny day at the beach in Barry. Gavin has a heart-to-heart with his dad, which gives him much to think about, while a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair. Mathew Horne, Joanna Page, James Corden and Ruth Jones star

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.title: Holby City
programme.sub-title: Not Just a River in Egypt
programme.desc: Sean realises Jess doesn't love him and ends their relationship, while Connie takes advantage of both her husband's new-found power and the conflict between Zubin and Ric to expand her influence. Chrissie arranges for Mark to be interviewed for a permanent position, which he decides to take to prove to Tricia he can be counted on. Dominic Fryer returns to Holby and is attacked by a student, leaving him in need of urgent attention. Diane later finds the girl in question has taken an overdose, and suspects he has raped her as well. She makes her accusation public while he is in surgery, just as the procedure goes badly wrong

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: A teenage girl is admitted to the ED after losing consciousness on a bridge and falling onto Charlie's car, but the staff are perplexed by her claims that she can see angels. programme.desc: Jack announces he is quitting the team, but before Sandra, Brian and Gerry can question his reasons, shadowy Whitehall figure Stephen Fisher arrives with one of his secret cases - the unsolved murder of a woman dating back more than 160 years. With just 24 hours to solve it, will the sleuths find time to get to the bottom of Jack's shock decision and persuade him to stick around?

programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The detective duo are called to a hospital, where a series of suspicious deaths has raised fears a serial killer may be at work on the wards. However, Pascoe soon finds his own health is as much of a worry as the case itself. Robert Powell, Miriam Karlin and Haydn Gwynne guest star

programme.desc: Part two. Unwitting bank robbers draft in undercover copper Rickman as their getaway driver _ but her involvement provokes an angry reaction from her superiors, who insist she's overstepped the mark and is getting out of control. Suzanne Maddock and Simon Rouse star

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Jimmi helps to calm Poppy after she escapes with her baby. He visits the pub to see Eva, who confesses to the crime, but insists on staying to carry out her undercover work. Meanwhile, Jack vows revenge on Callum's murderer, and Heston continues to cause upset at the Mill

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Eva's undercover job comes to a dramatic conclusion when Jack begins to see through her deception. A patient plants a stink bomb in the Campus surgery, and when Michelle meets Heston for the first time she takes the opportunity to inform him of the staff's impression of him

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Connie investigates Dominic's death, and becomes very suspicious of Diane's behaviour - especially when she learns of their past relationship and the medical cause of the fatal accident. Mark tries to make peace with Chrissie, but to no avail, and two student doctors have a disastrous first day on the job, both managing to get on the wrong side of Owen

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Charlotte Salt joins the cast as Sam Nicholls, an ambitious Army medic on secondment. She begins by joining a paramedic crew for the day, but has to rely on her military training when an aggressive driver rams the ambulance off the road. Meanwhile, Noel is keen to increase security after a run-in with an angry patient, but an encounter with a grieving mother changes his mind

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two. Unwitting bank robbers draft in undercover copper Rickman as their getaway driver _ but her involvement provokes an angry reaction from her superiors, who insist she's overstepped the mark and is getting out of control. Suzanne Maddock and Simon Rouse star

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Minty proves himself to Sam by making the ultimate commitment, Vanessa bonds with Abi, and Ian pines after his youth. Meanwhile, Christian finds Syed the perfect job

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Minty seeks solace in Heather, Jane and Ian are shocked when Peter and Lucy are accused of cheating in their exams, and Dot presents Max with a gift that stops him dead

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Killing Me Softly with His Bad Pop Song
programme.desc: The lead singer of a band falls off a roof in an apparent suicide, but Harry's granddaughter Lola is certain it was murder

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: When a communist student is found dead after a run-in with local workers, Blake sifts through the politics and intrigue to find the killer. Crime drama, starring Craig McLachlan

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Part one of two. An ailing American millionaire becomes obsessed with saving the art treasures of a slowly sinking Venice and his granddaughter hires Lovejoy to help in the quest. However, as soon as the roguish dealer arrives, he becomes embroiled in a murder. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon's growing relationship with boyfriend Colin hits the rocks, threatening her new-found happiness. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard has had enough of Pearl and decides to leave home for ever. However, he soon finds he misses her, so the trio try to reunite the couple. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde, with Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy decides to go trekking across the moors, but his adventure coincides with Auntie Wainwright's special offer of grocery delivery bicycles. Comedy, starring Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard is forced to take drastic measures, threatening wife Pearl that he will leave home to join the French Foreign Legion. Long-running comedy, starring Robert Fyfe

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The British airmen are forced to return to their hideout at Rene's cafe following a bungled escape attempt, and Edith continues to search for a new husband. Gorden Kaye and Carmen Silvera star

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The British send their finest French-speaking agent to say 'good moaning' to Rene and his colleagues and, dressed as a pantomime cow, the two airmen narrowly avoid being milked before going to a landing field to pick up their plane home

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: While driving a borrowed armoured car, Rene and Captain Geering are mistaken for an ammunition convoy and ambushed by the Resistance, giving Monsieur Alfonse the ideal opportunity to woo Edith. Comedy, starring Gorden Kaye

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: In their first case without trusty colleague Jack, the team members reinvestigate the disappearance of PE teacher Jason Bowe when the remains of a body are discovered near the elite public boarding school where he taught. Unfortunately, their snooping could not have come at a worse time for the staff, who are preparing to welcome a local MP to open their new computer centre - but what they do glean tells them the dead man seemed very much a loner. However, it soon turns out he got on much better with his students, forming close and inappropriate relationships with several. But could his behaviour have rattled someone enough to kill him? Susannah Harker and Nicola Walker guest star

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The duo are called out to a private zoo, where human remains have been found in the tigers' den. The evidence points to an unfortunate accident, but Dalziel suspects foul play - and a connection to a mysterious disappearance he investigated 20 years previously. Detective drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Part one of two. An ailing American millionaire becomes obsessed with saving the art treasures of a slowly sinking Venice and his granddaughter hires Lovejoy to help in the quest. However, as soon as the roguish dealer arrives, he becomes embroiled in a murder. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon's growing relationship with boyfriend Colin hits the rocks, threatening her new-found happiness. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: Spade searches for answers regarding the mysterious young boy everyone seems to be looking for. Samir takes him into hiding, but no one knows what to make of his incessant writing

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Featuring music by Elkie Brooks and sketches including Messrs Barker and Corbett reading their famous news items

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including sketches News Items, Fete Worse than Death, The Chars and Band of Slaves. Clodagh Rodgers performs Heartache in the studio

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The country's diverse wildlife, beginning by exploring how rural Chinese peasants in the south have developed a relationship with the region's animal inhabitants - including how water buffalo are used in agriculture, and tamed cormorants help their owners to fish

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The documentary series exploring China's wildlife continues with a journey to the Yunnan Province, where parallel mountain ranges channel mighty rivers from Tibet southward to the tropics, and the landscape provides a home to diverse species. While the mountain forests are home to red pandas, the valleys below contain jungles inhabited by gibbons, sunbirds and elephants

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: Wildlife living on the Tibetan plateau - an inhospitable area the size of western Europe - including brown bears, yaks, giant sheep, snow leopards and the chiru or Tibetan antelope

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part two of two. Timothy West and Prunella Scales' final journey takes them through Vietnam's Mekong Delta and across the border into Cambodia. They visit the capital city of Phenom Penh, and conclude their travels at Angkor Wat, an ancient temple built by the clever use of canals

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales return to the Oxford Canal, the waterway where they first fell in love with boating more than 40 years ago. Aboard their own boat, they travel north from Banbury, heading for the old canal port of Braunston, joined by their daughter Juliet and sons Sam and Joe. As they navigate their way through the beautiful Cherwell Valley, the couple look back at some their favourite voyages on the inland waterways of Britain and Ireland. As well as remembering great moments of joy and wonder, the voyage is tinged with sadness given the recent deterioration in Pru's dementia

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Veteran actors and married couple Timothy West and Prunella Scales celebrate their 50th wedding anniversary with four adventures around the canal networks of Britain and France. In the first edition, the pair head to the West Country to travel along the fully restored Kennet and Avon canal. Taking in the sights, characters and wildlife from Bath to Devizes, Wiltshire, the duo enjoy an eventful journey along the picturesque 21-mile stretch of water

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Classic British sci-fi adventure starring Jon Pertwee. When the Sea Devils take over the naval base, the Doctor is forced to work with the Master to revive the creatures' colony.

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: The actor examines stories of heroism in the Second World War and explores a world of assassins, saboteurs, commandos, real-life super-villains and the ultimate femmes fatales. David also gets a taste of what it was like to be sent undercover as he takes flight in Britain's last remaining Lysander aircraft - the plane used to get agents in and out of Nazi-occupied Europe

programme.title: David Jason's Secret Service
programme.desc: From hi-tech intelligence to undercover ops, the actor reveals how masterminds of the Second World War defeated Hitler with their problem-solving

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s. Leading motor racing and Second World War experts James Holland, Richard Williams, Eberhard Reuss and Chris Routledge tell the story of the Nazi-funded Auto Union and Mercedes Benz National Racing Cars

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: At St Athan in Wales, engineer John Sparks and his team of ex-Navy and RAF engineers begin the task of reassembling the Czech-built jet from nine parts delivered by lorry

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Skipper of the Ocean Venture John Buchan takes a huge risk in the deep and treacherous waters of the North Atlantic to find the perfect catch. Following the previous night's storm, the Amity crew faces a further setback, while Fruitful Bough fills its hold and heads for home

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Ryan tries his hand at offshore fishing on board Ryanwood - one of a pair of the most successful trawlers in Britain. However, he is forced to battle seasickness and knows that if he does not knuckle down to work, skipper Kevin West will not be asking him to join them again

programme.title: Warbird Workshop

programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: At St Athan in Wales, engineer John Sparks and his team of ex-Navy and RAF engineers begin the task of reassembling the Czech-built jet from nine parts delivered by lorry

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: With no plans to guide them, an elite team of expert engineers re-create a unique two-seater version of the legendary Hawker Hurricane fighter

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: The epic battle to rebuild The Waterbird, the Royal Navy's first seaplane. Filmed over 12 years, the labour intensive project tests veteran engineer Gerry Cooper

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del is invited to a school reunion at the Nag's Head organised by old adversary Roy Slater (Jim Broadbent), who has recently been released from prison and claims to have turned over a new leaf. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville encourages Gastric to become a fearless hunter in an effort to impress Madge and get closer to her. Mavis senses Mrs Featherstone, aka the Black Widow, making a move on Granville and decides to stand up for herself for once. Mr Newbold goes to the library in the hope of meeting up with Mrs Rossi, while Eric and Cyril finally get their wives to go camping - but who is going to help with the washing-up? David Jason, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Maggie Ollerenshaw star

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux B&B. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the pair make the most of their weekend away. Thomas is perplexed yet secretly thrilled by the sudden attention from the Plaguers, who, after admiring Alison's discarded portrait of him are now affording him celebrity status in Button House, hanging on to his every word. Supernatural comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mary walks Julian through her journey of self-discovery and how she finally found her voice. Thomas realises enough is enough - he must go 'cold turkey' on his Alison addiction and needs Pat's undivided attention. Old friends of Mike check in to the guesthouse and agree to share the surprising secret of their success. The Captain is thrown by a change to his daily routine, so Kitty steps in to teach him how to live in the moment. Robin helps Lady Button to remember lost friends

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Gabby and Greg go cap-in-hand to a possible financier for the festival - her own father. Meanwhile, Diane reveals a murky past, and attempting to lay her own to rest, Myrna reaches out to family. John recruits Frank to help him impress his father, Tom discovers something which threatens his grandad's newfound domestic bliss, and Rani tries to recruit some help for an audacious break-in. Richard E Grant guest stars

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary thinks Tony might be gay, and tries to uncover the truth without asking directly. However, his new flatmate attempts to impress Deborah with his language skills - despite not having any

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: First episode of Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French as the new vicar of a sleepy English village. Her arrival causes consternation among the locals - particularly stuffy councillor David Horton, who vows to have her ejected at all costs. Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet and Emma Chambers co-star

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: The Songs of Praise crew visits Dibley to record a programme in the village church. However, when Geraldine develops a crush on the producer her wayward emotions threaten to plunge the proceedings into disaster. Comedy, guest starring Peter Capaldi (The Thick of It)

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Geraldine is keen to find a celebrity to open the autumn fair in style - and Alice inadvertently comes up with the ideal candidate by letting slip she is related to one Reg Dwight - AKA Elton John. Comedy, starring Dawn French, and Emma Chambers with a guest appearance by Kylie Minogue. First shown in 1994

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A violent storm destroys St Barnabas's stained glass window, and Geraldine is put in charge of raising funds to replace it - but the others are unsure whether any of her outlandish ideas will actually work. Comedy, starring Dawn French, Gary Waldhorn, James Fleet, Emma Chambers and Liz Smith

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: Local election fever hits the village and Geraldine finds she is a more popular candidate with the voters than over-confident parish council chairman David. Richard Curtis's comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: The Vicar of Dibley
programme.desc: A funeral for a pet bird inspires Geraldine to transform the church into an ark and hold a special service for the animals of the village - but David is far from impressed by her stunt. Comedy, starring Dawn French and Gary Waldhorn

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy enters the import trade after striking a deal with Boycie to fetch a consignment of dodgy diamonds across from Holland, and ropes in Rodney and Uncle Albert to help. Their plans are jeopardised when old foe Chief Inspector Slater picks up the Trotters' trail. Feature-length episode of the comedy, guest starring Jim Broadbent, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters go on a lads' day out to Margate with their mates, but things do not go as expected when their bus blows up, leaving them stranded overnight in the seaside town. Finding a room in the hotel from hell, the brothers are only too happy to go out and sample the local nightlife - and that's when Del-Boy gets a blast from the past. Feature-length Christmas special from 1989, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: He Ain't Heavy, He's My Uncle
programme.desc: Uncle Albert falls victim to muggers, so Del-Boy resolves to take the law into his own hands, while Rodney becomes a director in Trotters Independent Traders - and his first job is to give the car a good clean. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: Three Men, a Woman and a Baby
programme.desc: Rodney and Albert begin to worry the flat will get overcrowded as the birth of Del-Boy Jr approaches, while Del feels well prepared for fatherhood thanks to a stint at antenatal classes with Raquel. Starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del becomes a showbiz entrepreneur after discovering a sensational Tom Jones-style singer at a local club. Teaming him up with Raquel, he wastes no time in booking the duo at a birthday party for the elderly mother of a local hoodlum - but it soon becomes clear his new signing is not everything he is cracked up to be. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones, with a guest appearance by Philip Pope

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville struggles to find some privacy when the milkwoman makes a pass at him, so nurse Gladys Emmanuel steps in by persuading Arkwright to take her to a hotel. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason Granville First broadcast in March 1981

programme.title: Open All Hours: Inside Out
programme.desc: Diane Morgan narrates this special documentary about the much-loved comedy, featuring contributions from Sir David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Tim Healy, Ronnie Barker's daughter Charlotte, and more

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del becomes a showbiz entrepreneur after discovering a sensational Tom Jones-style singer at a local club. Teaming him up with Raquel, he wastes no time in booking the duo at a birthday party for the elderly mother of a local hoodlum - but it soon becomes clear his new signing is not everything he is cracked up to be. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones, with a guest appearance by Philip Pope

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville's idea to open a new catering arm, offering his customers tasty toasties, doesn't quite go according to plan when his reconditioned toaster blows a fuse. Mr Newbold gets a little bolder in his pursuit of Mrs Rossi, while trying to avoid the Black Widow. Leroy and Willis meet Beth and Ruby with a view to going on a date, but Willis is worried that Ruby's not right for him. David Jason, James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Geoffrey Whitehead star in veteran writer Roy Clarke's much-loved comedy

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Yvonne refuses to come out of her room when partner Barry leaves the Maplins holiday camp, but soon changes her mind after Gladys organises a stand-in for her. Comedy, starring Ruth Madoc and Diane Holland

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: Three Men, a Woman and a Baby
programme.desc: Rodney and Albert begin to worry the flat will get overcrowded as the birth of Del-Boy Jr approaches, while Del feels well prepared for fatherhood thanks to a stint at antenatal classes with Raquel. Starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy enters the import trade after striking a deal with Boycie to fetch a consignment of dodgy diamonds across from Holland, and ropes in Rodney and Uncle Albert to help. Their plans are jeopardised when old foe Chief Inspector Slater picks up the Trotters' trail. Feature-length episode of the comedy, guest starring Jim Broadbent, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Alma's Not Normal
programme.desc: There's some good news for Lin as the hospital staff inform her that her section could finally be lifted, although this is dependent on her either moving into a hostel or in with a family member. As Alma is finally getting her life back on track and the hostel isn't exactly the right place for a recovering addict, Alma has to convince her grandma to let Lin move in with her - but will this be a step too far for Lin and Joan?

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down to the Woods
programme.desc: Marlene is distraught when Tyler and Earl the dog go missing. Boycie, Bryan and Jed form a search party, but hunting through the haunted woods at night proves a less than pleasant experience for the would-be rescuers. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Humphries catches a rare and contagious tropical disease - and it is not long before his workmates are getting on each other's nerves even more than usual while quarantined from the outside world. Vintage comedy, starring Mollie Sugden, John Inman and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo buys Sid's wetsuit and, under Foggy's supervision, tries scuba diving and waterskiing. Bill Owen and Brian Wilde star

programme.desc: Tipped off by Frazer and Godfrey, Mainwaring and Wilson investigate a house from where they believe someone may have been signalling to enemy aircraft. Remake of the classic sitcom, starring Kevin McNally, Robert Bathurst and Kevin Eldon

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Mrs Featherstone, aka the Black Widow, decides the time has come to learn to drive - if only she can find an instructor prepared to give her more than one lesson. Kath organises a bring and buy sale for charity, but Eric is less than happy when he discovers she is planning to put his favourite clothes on her stall. Meanwhile, romance seems to be blossoming for Madge and Gastric, and Willis finally gets away from his mother to go on a date with Ruby. David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy and Johnny Vegas star

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Toby threatens to fire Madeline when he discovers she is still seeing Tom. Nigel Havers and Tony Britton star

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank begrudgingly accompanies Margaret on a visit to his ex-wife, revealing to his daughter a side she never knew existed. Greg continues to downplay his chances with Anne-Marie, forcing Gabby to commence Operation Greg 2.0. Diane sniffs a lead before going on an unlikely date. John meets a cook, and tries crack. DCI Haines and DS Selforth build their case, leading to a near miss with the two youngest outlaws

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The spooks' thoughtless behaviour sends Alison into meltdown, prompting them to come up with a creative way to get back into her good books and show her how truly sorry they are. Mary however, believing she has done nothing wrong, refuses to take any responsibility, not after the fiery fate that befell her the last time she took the blame for something she didn't do. Alison and Mike have a last-minute cancellation for the guesthouse and decide that a relaxing day off is exactly what they need. Comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.desc: Compo manages to convince a barmaid that hapless Foggy is really an eccentric millionaire, having made his fortune in the frozen turkey business. Long-running comedy, starring Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Godber starts work on another O-level course, but wily old cellmate Fletcher can't understand why he doesn't just cheat in the exam. Prison comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Richard finds time weighing heavily on his hands, so Hyacinth decides to provide him with a hobby - a move that backfires on her in spectacular fashion. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge, Clive Swift and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down to the Woods
programme.desc: Marlene is distraught when Tyler and Earl the dog go missing. Boycie, Bryan and Jed form a search party, but hunting through the haunted woods at night proves a less than pleasant experience for the would-be rescuers. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Yvonne refuses to come out of her room when partner Barry leaves the Maplins holiday camp, but soon changes her mind after Gladys organises a stand-in for her. Comedy, starring Ruth Madoc and Diane Holland

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del is invited to a school reunion at the Nag's Head organised by old adversary Roy Slater (Jim Broadbent), who has recently been released from prison and claims to have turned over a new leaf. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Humphries catches a rare and contagious tropical disease - and it is not long before his workmates are getting on each other's nerves even more than usual while quarantined from the outside world. Vintage comedy, starring Mollie Sugden, John Inman and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Open All Hours: Inside Out
programme.desc: Diane Morgan narrates this special documentary about the much-loved comedy, featuring contributions from Sir David Jason, Johnny Vegas, Tim Healy, Ronnie Barker's daughter Charlotte, and more

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo buys Sid's wetsuit and, under Foggy's supervision, tries scuba diving and waterskiing. Bill Owen and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Dad's Army: The Lost Episodes
programme.desc: Tipped off by Frazer and Godfrey, Mainwaring and Wilson investigate a house from where they believe someone may have been signalling to enemy aircraft. They take the suspect back to the church hall, but chaos ensues when an incendiary bomb comes through the roof and the platoon desperately battles the blaze. Remake of the classic sitcom, starring Kevin McNally, Robert Bathurst and Kevin Eldon

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: An Errand Boy by the Ear
programme.desc: Arkwright decides Granville needs toughening up and starts dragging him around the store by his ear, but the regular customers are unhappy by what they see

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville's idea to open a new catering arm, offering his customers tasty toasties, doesn't quite go according to plan when his reconditioned toaster blows a fuse. Mr Newbold gets a little bolder in his pursuit of Mrs Rossi, while trying to avoid the Black Widow. Leroy and Willis meet Beth and Ruby with a view to going on a date, but Willis is worried that Ruby's not right for him. David Jason, James Baxter, Johnny Vegas and Geoffrey Whitehead star in veteran writer Roy Clarke's much-loved comedy

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del is invited to a school reunion at the Nag's Head organised by old adversary Roy Slater (Jim Broadbent), who has recently been released from prison and claims to have turned over a new leaf. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Tessa Peake-Jones

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Yvonne refuses to come out of her room when partner Barry leaves the Maplins holiday camp, but soon changes her mind after Gladys organises a stand-in for her. Comedy, starring Ruth Madoc and Diane Holland

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Tim and Kate's closeness following the death of his grandmother becomes a cause for concern for Lee, so he shares his worries with a counsellor - who is unimpressed by his lack of social skills. The subsequent funeral descends into chaos, thanks to an irate elderly relative and an addictive drink

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee pretends to be gay to find out more about a new business acquaintance - but only because his reward for doing so is tickets to Wembley. His deception is soon uncovered and he is taken to a 'specialist' club to test his alleged sexuality. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: Frank begrudgingly accompanies Margaret on a visit to his ex-wife, revealing to his daughter a side she never knew existed. Greg continues to downplay his chances with Anne-Marie, forcing Gabby to commence Operation Greg 2.0. Diane sniffs a lead before going on an unlikely date. John meets a cook, and tries crack. DCI Haines and DS Selforth build their case, leading to a near miss with the two youngest outlaws

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The spooks' thoughtless behaviour sends Alison into meltdown, prompting them to come up with a creative way to get back into her good books and show her how truly sorry they are. Mary however, believing she has done nothing wrong, refuses to take any responsibility, not after the fiery fate that befell her the last time she took the blame for something she didn't do. Alison and Mike have a last-minute cancellation for the guesthouse and decide that a relaxing day off is exactly what they need. Comedy, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Kiell Smith-Bynoe and Simon Farnaby

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down to the Woods
programme.desc: Marlene is distraught when Tyler and Earl the dog go missing. Boycie, Bryan and Jed form a search party, but hunting through the haunted woods at night proves a less than pleasant experience for the would-be rescuers. John Challis and Sue Holderness star

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tony decides to break up with his girlfriend and agonises over the best way to go about it. He unintentionally creates the ideal opportunity by cancelling a date to prepare a meal for Deborah. Starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers travels to Homestead Correctional Institution in Florida to meet Amber Wright, who, at the age of 15 conspired with a group of friends to murder her ex-boyfriend Seath Jackson, an innocent teenage boy who was beaten, shot, and knee-capped before his corpse was burnt and his remains thrown in a quarry. Later, Piers travels to meet Seath's parents in Summerfield, Florida, with their visceral anger standing in stark contrast to Amber's cool demeanour. It soon emerges that Amber was a central player in the plot to kill Seath, but will she take responsibility for her actions?

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: Three missing fingers point to the identity of a body found near Catalina Island, leading to a wealthy mogul, a luxurious yacht and an unlikely killer

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the country's best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Dudley, a man collapses while playing bingo two days before his wedding, while in Stoke, crews are called to help an elderly man who has had an unexplained fall.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition is the one and only Jamie Oliver! 18 contestants have 90 minutes to create a 'secret weapon' dish - and the winner gets a secret advantage

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.desc: Pete helps rehabilitate a group of ex-racing greyhounds who have never experienced life beyond the racetrack

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets a litter of puppies who were found abandoned in a crisp box, and helps the staff fight to keep them alive

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets a puppy who needs urgent treatment for a badly broken leg and a young Doberman who has spent most of her life in quarantine kennels

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete travels to Northern Ireland to pick up three stray dogs and bring them back to Essex. He also meets a Shar Pei who is in constant pain and may need surgery

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildon's Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine.
